    86→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    87→@Composable
    88→fun PostDetailScreen(
    89→    postId: String,
    90→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    91→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    92→    onReplyClick: (String) -> Unit,
    93→    onQuoteClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    94→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    95→    isLoggedIn: Boolean = true,
    96→    viewModel: PostDetailViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    97→) {
    98→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    99→    val context = LocalContext.current
   100→    val confirmBeforeDelete by viewModel.preferencesManager.confirmBeforeDelete.collectAsState(initial = true)
   101→    val confirmBeforeShare by viewModel.preferencesManager.confirmBeforeShare.collectAsState(initial = false)
   102→    var showDeleteConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   103→    var showShareConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   104→
   105→    // Navigate back after successful deletion
   106→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isDeleted) {
   107→        if (uiState.isDeleted) {
   108→            onNavigateBack()
   109→        }
   110→    }
   111→
   112→    // Reaction picker bottom sheet
   113→    if (uiState.showReactionPicker) {
   114→        ModalBottomSheet(
   115→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
   116→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   117→        ) {
   118→            ReactionPicker(
   119→                reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
   120→                isSubmitting = uiState.isReacting,
   121→                onEmojiSelect = { viewModel.toggleReaction(it) },
   122→                onClose = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() }
   123→            )
   124→        }
   125→    }
   126→
   127→    // Shares bottom sheet
   128→    if (uiState.showSharesSheet) {
   129→        ModalBottomSheet(
   130→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() },
   131→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   132→        ) {
   133→            SharesSheet(
   134→                actors = uiState.shareActors,
   135→                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingShares,
   136→                onProfileClick = { handle ->
   137→                    viewModel.dismissSharesSheet()
   138→                    onProfileClick(handle)
   139→                },
   140→                onClose = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() }
   141→            )
   142→        }
   143→    }
   144→
   145→    // Quotes bottom sheet
   146→    if (uiState.showQuotesSheet) {
   147→        ModalBottomSheet(
   148→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() },
   149→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   150→        ) {
   151→            QuotesSheet(
   152→                posts = uiState.quotePosts,
   153→                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingQuotes,
   154→                onPostClick = { id ->
   155→                    viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet()
   156→                    onPostClick(id)
   157→                },
   158→                onClose = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() }
   159→            )
   160→        }
   161→    }
   162→
   163→    if (showDeleteConfirmation) {
   164→        AlertDialog(
   165→            onDismissRequest = { showDeleteConfirmation = false },
   166→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm_title)) },
   167→            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm)) },
   168→            confirmButton = {
   169→                TextButton(
   170→                    onClick = {
   171→                        showDeleteConfirmation = false
   172→                        viewModel.deletePost()
   173→                    }
   174→                ) {
   175→                    Text(
   176→                        stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
   177→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   178→                    )
   179→                }
   180→            },
   181→            dismissButton = {
   182→                TextButton(onClick = { showDeleteConfirmation = false }) {
   183→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   184→                }
   185→            }
   186→        )
   187→    }
   188→
   189→    if (showShareConfirmation) {
   190→        val hasShared = uiState.post?.viewerHasShared == true
   191→        AlertDialog(
   192→            onDismissRequest = { showShareConfirmation = false },
   193→            title = {
   194→                Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_title else R.string.share_confirm_title))
   195→            },
   196→            confirmButton = {
   197→                TextButton(
   198→                    onClick = {
   199→                        showShareConfirmation = false
   200→                        if (hasShared) viewModel.unsharePost() else viewModel.sharePost()
   201→                    }
   202→                ) {
   203→                    Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_action else R.string.share_confirm_action))
   204→                }
   205→            },
   206→            dismissButton = {
   207→                TextButton(onClick = { showShareConfirmation = false }) {
   208→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   209→                }
   210→            }
   211→        )
   212→    }
   213→
   214→    if (uiState.deleteError != null) {
   215→        AlertDialog(
   216→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() },
   217→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.action_error)) },
   218→            text = { Text(uiState.deleteError ?: "") },
   219→            confirmButton = {
   220→                TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() }) {
   221→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.ok))
   222→                }
   223→            }
   224→        )
   225→    }
   226→
   227→    Scaffold(
   228→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   229→        topBar = {
   230→            CompactTopBar(
   231→                title = if (uiState.post?.typename == "Article") "Article" else "Post",
   232→                navigationIcon = {
   233→                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   234→                        Icon(
   235→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
   236→                            contentDescription = "Back"
   237→                        )
   238→                    }
   239→                },
   240→                actions = {
   241→                    if (uiState.canDelete) {
   242→                        PostDetailActionMenu(
   243→                            isDeleting = uiState.isDeleting,
   244→                            onDelete = {
   245→                                if (confirmBeforeDelete) {
   246→                                    showDeleteConfirmation = true
   247→                                } else {
   248→                                    viewModel.deletePost()
   249→                                }
   250→                            }
   251→                        )
   252→                    }
   253→                }
   254→            )
   255→        },
   256→        floatingActionButton = {
   257→            if (uiState.post != null && isLoggedIn) {
   258→                FloatingActionButton(
   259→                    onClick = { onReplyClick(postId) }
   260→                ) {
   261→                    Icon(
   262→                        imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   263→                        contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply)
   264→                    )
   265→                }
   266→            }
   267→        }
   268→    ) { paddingValues ->
   269→        Box(
   270→            modifier = Modifier
   271→                .fillMaxSize()
   272→                .padding(paddingValues)
   273→        ) {
   274→            when {
   275→                uiState.isLoading -> {
   276→                    FullScreenLoading()
   277→                }
   278→                uiState.error != null -> {
   279→                    ErrorMessage(
   280→                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   281→                        onRetry = { viewModel.loadPost(postId) }
   282→                    )
   283→                }
   284→                uiState.post != null -> {
   285→                    PullToRefreshBox(
   286→                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   287→                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   288→                    ) {
   289→                        PostDetailContent(
   290→                            post = uiState.post!!,
   291→                            reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
   292→                            replies = uiState.replies,
   293→                            hasMoreReplies = uiState.hasMoreReplies,
   294→                            isLoadingMoreReplies = uiState.isLoadingMoreReplies,
   295→                            onLoadMoreReplies = { viewModel.loadMoreReplies() },
   296→                            onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   297→                            onPostClick = onPostClick,
   298→                            onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(postId) },
   299→                            onShareClick = {
   300→                                if (confirmBeforeShare) {
   301→                                    showShareConfirmation = true
   302→                                } else {
   303→                                    if (uiState.post!!.viewerHasShared) {
   304→                                        viewModel.unsharePost()
   305→                                    } else {
   306→                                        viewModel.sharePost()
   307→                                    }
   308→                                }
   309→                            },
   310→                            onReactionClick = { emoji -> viewModel.toggleReaction(emoji) },
   311→                            onReactionPickerClick = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
   312→                            onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(postId) },
   313→                            onSharesClick = { viewModel.showSharesSheet() },
   314→                            onQuotesClick = { viewModel.showQuotesSheet() },
   315→                            onExternalShareClick = {
   316→                                val shareUrl = uiState.post?.url
   317→                                    ?: uiState.post?.iri
   318→                                if (shareUrl != null) {
   319→                                    val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   320→                                        action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   321→                                        putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   322→                                        type = "text/plain"
   323→                                    }
   324→                                    context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   325→                                }
   326→                            }
   327→                        )
   328→                    }
   329→                }
   330→            }
   331→        }
   332→    }
   333→}

   335→@Composable
   336→private fun PostDetailActionMenu(
   337→    isDeleting: Boolean,
   338→    onDelete: () -> Unit
   339→) {
   340→    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   341→
   342→    Box {
   343→        IconButton(onClick = { expanded = true }) {
   344→            Icon(
   345→                imageVector = Icons.Filled.MoreVert,
   346→                contentDescription = "More actions"
   347→            )
   348→        }
   349→
   350→        DropdownMenu(
   351→            expanded = expanded,
   352→            onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
   353→        ) {
   354→            DropdownMenuItem(
   355→                text = {
   356→                    Text(
   357→                        text = stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
   358→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   359→                    )
   360→                },
   361→                leadingIcon = {
   362→                    Icon(
   363→                        imageVector = Icons.Filled.Delete,
   364→                        contentDescription = null,
   365→                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   366→                    )
   367→                },
   368→                onClick = {
   369→                    expanded = false
   370→                    onDelete()
   371→                },
   372→                enabled = !isDeleting
   373→            )
   374→        }
   375→    }
   376→}

   378→@Composable
   379→private fun PostDetailContent(
   380→    post: Post,
   381→    reactionGroups: List<ReactionGroup>,
   382→    replies: List<Post>,
   383→    hasMoreReplies: Boolean = false,
   384→    isLoadingMoreReplies: Boolean = false,
   385→    onLoadMoreReplies: () -> Unit = {},
   386→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
   387→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   388→    onShareClick: () -> Unit,
   389→    onReplyClick: () -> Unit,
   390→    onReactionClick: (String) -> Unit,
   391→    onReactionPickerClick: () -> Unit,
   392→    onQuoteClick: () -> Unit,
   393→    onSharesClick: () -> Unit,
   394→    onQuotesClick: () -> Unit,
   395→    onExternalShareClick: () -> Unit
   396→) {
   397→    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, yyyy 'at' h:mm a")
   398→        .withZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())
   399→
   400→    LazyColumn {
   401→        item {
   402→            Column(
   403→                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
   404→            ) {
   405→                // Reply target preview
   406→                if (post.replyTarget != null) {
   407→                    ReplyTargetPreview(
   408→                        post = post.replyTarget!!,
   409→                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.replyTarget!!.id) },
   410→                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   411→                    )
   412→
   413→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   414→
   415→                    Row(
   416→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   417→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   418→                    ) {
   419→                        Icon(
   420→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   421→                            contentDescription = null,
   422→                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   423→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   424→                        )
   425→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   426→                        Text(
   427→                            text = "${stringResource(R.string.replying_to)} @${post.replyTarget!!.actor.handle}",
   428→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   429→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   430→                        )
   431→                    }
   432→
   433→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   434→                    HorizontalDivider()
   435→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   436→                }
   437→
   438→                Row(
   439→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   440→                ) {
   441→                    AsyncImage(
   442→                        model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   443→                        contentDescription = null,
   444→                        modifier = Modifier
   445→                            .size(48.dp)
   446→                            .clip(CircleShape)
   447→                            .clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) },
   448→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   449→                    )
   450→
   451→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   452→
   453→                    Column(
   454→                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) }
   455→                    ) {
   456→                        Text(
   457→                            text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   458→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   459→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   460→                        )
   461→                        Text(
   462→                            text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   463→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   464→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   465→                        )
   466→                    }
   467→                }
   468→
   469→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   470→
   471→                val isArticle = post.typename == "Article"
   472→
   473→                post.name?.let { title ->
   474→                    Text(
   475→                        text = title,
   476→                        style = if (isArticle) MaterialTheme.typography.headlineLarge else MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   477→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   478→                    )
   479→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(if (isArticle) 12.dp else 8.dp))
   480→                    if (isArticle) {
   481→                        HorizontalDivider()
   482→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   483→                    }
   484→                }
   485→
   486→                HtmlContent(
   487→                    html = post.content,
   488→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   489→                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   490→                )
   491→
   492→                if (post.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   493→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   494→                    MediaGrid(media = post.media)
   495→                }
   496→
   497→                if (post.quotedPost != null) {
   498→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   499→                    QuotedPostPreview(
   500→                        post = post.quotedPost!!,
   501→                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.quotedPost!!.id) },
   502→                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   503→                    )
   504→                }
   505→
   506→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   507→
   508→                Row(
   509→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   510→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   511→                ) {
   512→                    Text(
   513→                        text = dateFormatter.format(post.published),
   514→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   515→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   516→                    )
   517→
   518→                    if (post.visibility != pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.PUBLIC) {
   519→                        Text(
   520→                            text = "\u00B7",
   521→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   522→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   523→                        )
   524→                        Icon(
   525→                            imageVector = when (post.visibility) {
   526→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   527→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> Icons.Outlined.Group
   528→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   529→                                else -> Icons.Filled.Public
   530→                            },
   531→                            contentDescription = when (post.visibility) {
   532→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> "Unlisted"
   533→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> "Followers only"
   534→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> "Direct"
   535→                                else -> "Public"
   536→                            },
   537→                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   538→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   539→                        )
   540→                    }
   541→                }
   542→
   543→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   544→
   545→                Row(
   546→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   547→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
   548→                ) {
   549→                    Text(
   550→                        text = "${post.engagementStats.replies} ${stringResource(R.string.replies)}",
   551→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   552→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   553→                    )
   554→                    Text(
   555→                        text = "${post.engagementStats.shares} ${stringResource(R.string.shares)}",
   556→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   557→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   558→                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onSharesClick() }
   559→                    )
   560→                    Text(
   561→                        text = "${post.engagementStats.reactions} ${stringResource(R.string.reactions)}",
   562→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   563→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   564→                    )
   565→                    Text(
   566→                        text = "${post.engagementStats.quotes} ${stringResource(R.string.quotes)}",
   567→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   568→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   569→                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onQuotesClick() }
   570→                    )
   571→                }
   572→
   573→                if (reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   574→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   575→                    Row {
   576→                        reactionGroups.forEach { group ->
   577→                            Card(
   578→                                onClick = {
   579→                                    group.emoji?.let { onReactionClick(it) }
   580→                                },
   581→                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
   582→                                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   583→                                    containerColor = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   584→                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.2f)
   585→                                    else
   586→                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   587→                                ),
   588→                                modifier = Modifier.padding(end = 8.dp)
   589→                            ) {
   590→                                Row(
   591→                                    modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 6.dp),
   592→                                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   593→                                ) {
   594→                                    if (group.emoji != null) {
   595→                                        Text(text = group.emoji)
   596→                                    } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
   597→                                        AsyncImage(
   598→                                            model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
   599→                                            contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
   600→                                            modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   601→                                        )
   602→                                    }
   603→                                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   604→                                    Text(
   605→                                        text = group.count.toString(),
   606→                                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   607→                                        color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   608→                                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   609→                                        else
   610→                                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
   611→                                    )
   612→                                }
   613→                            }
   614→                        }
   615→                    }
   616→                }
   617→
   618→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   619→
   620→                Row {
   621→                    IconButton(onClick = onReplyClick) {
   622→                        Icon(
   623→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   624→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply),
   625→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   626→                        )
   627→                    }
   628→                    IconButton(onClick = onShareClick) {
   629→                        Icon(
   630→                            imageVector = Icons.Filled.Repeat,
   631→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
   632→                            tint = if (post.viewerHasShared)
   633→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   634→                            else
   635→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   636→                        )
   637→                    }
   638→                    IconButton(onClick = onReactionPickerClick) {
   639→                        Icon(
   640→                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.AddReaction,
   641→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reactions),
   642→                            tint = if (reactionGroups.any { it.viewerHasReacted })
   643→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   644→                            else
   645→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   646→                        )
   647→                    }
   648→                    IconButton(onClick = onQuoteClick) {
   649→                        Icon(
   650→                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.FormatQuote,
   651→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
   652→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   653→                        )
   654→                    }
   655→                    IconButton(onClick = onExternalShareClick) {
   656→                        Icon(
   657→                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.Share,
   658→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
   659→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   660→                        )
   661→                    }
   662→                }
   663→            }
   664→
   665→            HorizontalDivider()
   666→        }
   667→
   668→        if (replies.isNotEmpty()) {
   669→            item {
   670→                Text(
   671→                    text = stringResource(R.string.replies),
   672→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   673→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   674→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
   675→                )
   676→            }
   677→
   678→            items(
   679→                items = replies,
   680→                key = { it.id }
   681→            ) { reply ->
   682→                PostCard(
   683→                    post = reply,
   684→                    onClick = { onPostClick(reply.id) },
   685→                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   686→                    onQuotedPostClick = onPostClick
   687→                )
   688→                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   689→            }
   690→
   691→            if (isLoadingMoreReplies) {
   692→                item {
   693→                    LoadingItem()
   694→                }
   695→            } else if (hasMoreReplies) {
   696→                item {
   697→                    TextButton(
   698→                        onClick = onLoadMoreReplies,
   699→                        modifier = Modifier
   700→                            .fillMaxWidth()
   701→                            .padding(12.dp)
   702→                    ) {
   703→                        Text(stringResource(R.string.load_more))
   704→                    }
   705→                }
   706→            }
   707→        }
   708→    }
   709→}

   711→@Composable
   712→private fun SharesSheet(
   713→    actors: List<pub.hackers.android.domain.model.Actor>,
   714→    isLoading: Boolean,
   715→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
   716→    onClose: () -> Unit
   717→) {
   718→    Column(
   719→        modifier = Modifier

   723→        Text(
   724→            text = stringResource(R.string.shares),
   725→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   726→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   727→            modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 16.dp)

   729→
   730→        if (isLoading) {
   731→            Box(
   732→                modifier = Modifier
   733→                    .fillMaxWidth()

   748→                Row(
   749→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,

   751→                        .fillMaxWidth()

   755→                    AsyncImage(
   756→                        model = actor.avatarUrl,
   757→                        contentDescription = null,

   759→                            .size(40.dp)

   761→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop

   765→                        Text(
   766→                            text = actor.name ?: actor.handle,
   767→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   768→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   769→                        )
   770→                        Text(
   771→                            text = "@${actor.handle}",
   772→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   773→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   774→                        )
   775→                    }
   776→                }
   777→            }
   778→        }
   779→    }
   780→}
   781→
   782→@Composable
   783→private fun QuotesSheet(
   784→    posts: List<Post>,
   785→    isLoading: Boolean,
   786→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   787→    onClose: () -> Unit
   788→) {
   789→    Column(
   790→        modifier = Modifier
   791→            .fillMaxWidth()
   792→            .padding(16.dp)
   793→    ) {
   794→        Text(
   795→            text = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
   796→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   797→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   798→            modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 16.dp)
   799→        )
   800→
   801→        if (isLoading) {
   802→            Box(
   803→                modifier = Modifier
   804→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   805→                    .height(100.dp),
   806→                contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   807→            ) {
   808→                CircularProgressIndicator()
   809→            }
   810→        } else if (posts.isEmpty()) {
   811→            Text(
   812→                text = "No quotes yet",
   813→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   814→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   815→                modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 24.dp)
   816→            )
   817→        } else {
   818→            posts.forEach { post ->
   819→                Column(
   820→                    modifier = Modifier
   821→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   822→                        .clickable { onPostClick(post.id) }
   823→                        .padding(vertical = 8.dp)
   824→                ) {
   825→                    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   826→                        AsyncImage(
   827→                            model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   828→                            contentDescription = null,
   829→                            modifier = Modifier
   830→                                .size(32.dp)
   831→                                .clip(CircleShape),
   832→                            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   833→                        )
   834→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   835→                        Column {
   836→                            Text(
   837→                                text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   838→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   839→                                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   840→                            )
   841→                            Text(
   842→                                text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   843→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   844→                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   845→                            )
   846→                        }
   847→                    }
   848→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   849→                    HtmlContent(
   850→                        html = post.content,
   851→                        maxLines = 3,
   852→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   853→                    )
   854→                }
   855→                HorizontalDivider(modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp))
   856→            }
   857→        }
   858→    }
   859→}
   860→
   861→@Composable
   862→private fun ReplyTargetPreview(
   863→    post: Post,
   864→    onClick: () -> Unit,
   865→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit
   866→) {
   867→    Column(
   868→        modifier = Modifier
   869→            .fillMaxWidth()
   870→            .clickable(onClick = onClick)
   871→            .alpha(0.6f)
   872→    ) {
   873→        Row(
   874→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   875→        ) {
   876→            AsyncImage(
   877→                model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   878→                contentDescription = null,
   879→                modifier = Modifier
   880→                    .size(40.dp)
   881→                    .clip(CircleShape)
   882→                    .clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) },
   883→                contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   884→            )
   885→
   886→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   887→
   888→            Column {
   889→                Text(
   890→                    text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   891→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   892→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   893→                    maxLines = 1
   894→                )
   895→                Text(
   896→                    text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   897→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   898→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   899→                    maxLines = 1
   900→                )
   901→            }
   902→        }
   903→
   904→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   905→
   906→        HtmlContent(
   907→            html = post.content,
   908→            maxLines = 3,
   909→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   910→            onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   911→        )
   912→
   913→        if (post.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   914→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   915→            MediaGrid(media = post.media)
   916→        }
   917→    }
   918→}
   919→

content.text:
I now have a thorough understanding of both the design spec and the existing codebase. Let me verify the blocker fixes systematically.

---

**APPROVED**

All four previously identified blockers have been adequately resolved:

**B1: Post Detail Screen -- RESOLVED.** The spec now includes a comprehensive "Post Detail Screen" section (lines 153-200) covering the header, expanded post content, article post variant, engagement stats row, action bar, reaction groups, reaction picker bottom sheet, shares/quotes list bottom sheet, and reply thread. This aligns well with the existing `PostDetailScreen.kt` implementation and provides sufficient detail for the redesign.

**B2: Bottom Navigation Bar -- RESOLVED.** A dedicated "Bottom Navigation Bar" section (lines 103-114) now specifies height (56dp), background color per theme, top border treatment, tab sets for both authenticated and unauthenticated states, icon sizing, label typography, active/inactive styling, and notification dot placement. This maps cleanly to the existing `HackersPubApp.kt` navigation setup.

**B3: Author name typography conflict -- RESOLVED.** The `bodyLargeSemiBold` style (line 53) is explicitly defined at 15sp/600, distinct from `bodyLarge` at 15sp/400. The post card layout correctly references `bodyLargeSemiBold` for author names (line 141), eliminating the ambiguity.

**B4: Engagement active colors incomplete -- RESOLVED.** All five engagement actions are individually specified (lines 97-101): Reply uses `accent`, Share/Repost uses `share` green, Reaction/Heart uses `reaction` red (filled), Quote uses `accent`, and External Share has no active state (always `textSecondary`). This is complete and unambiguous.

**No new blockers introduced.** The spec is internally consistent, maps to existing screens and navigation structure, and the migration strategy (lines 293-306) correctly identifies it as a UI-layer-only change. The notes about profile stats availability (line 308) and font scaling compatibility (line 310) are pragmatic safeguards. The tab configuration in the spec (4 tabs authenticated, 4 tabs unauthenticated -- line 108-109) differs from the current implementation (5 tabs authenticated with Settings, 3 tabs unauthenticated) but this is an intentional redesign choice, not an error -- Settings moves elsewhere or is accessed differently.

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /Users/kodingwarrior/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/superpowers/5.0.5/skills/writing-plans

# Writing Plans

## Overview

Write comprehensive implementation plans assuming the engineer has zero context for our codebase and questionable taste. Document everything they need to know: which files to touch for each task, code, testing, docs they might need to check, how to test it. Give them the whole plan as bite-sized tasks. DRY. YAGNI. TDD. Frequent commits.

Assume they are a skilled developer, but know almost nothing about our toolset or problem domain. Assume they don't know good test design very well.

**Announce at start:** "I'm using the writing-plans skill to create the implementation plan."

**Context:** This should be run in a dedicated worktree (created by brainstorming skill).

**Save plans to:** `docs/superpowers/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<feature-name>.md`
- (User preferences for plan location override this default)

## Scope Check

If the spec covers multiple independent subsystems, it should have been broken into sub-project specs during brainstorming. If it wasn't, suggest breaking this into separate plans — one per subsystem. Each plan should produce working, testable software on its own.

## File Structure

Before defining tasks, map out which files will be created or modified and what each one is responsible for. This is where decomposition decisions get locked in.

- Design units with clear boundaries and well-defined interfaces. Each file should have one clear responsibility.
- You reason best about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more reliable when files are focused. Prefer smaller, focused files over large ones that do too much.
- Files that change together should live together. Split by responsibility, not by technical layer.
- In existing codebases, follow established patterns. If the codebase uses large files, don't unilaterally restructure - but if a file you're modifying has grown unwieldy, including a split in the plan is reasonable.

This structure informs the task decomposition. Each task should produce self-contained changes that make sense independently.

## Bite-Sized Task Granularity

**Each step is one action (2-5 minutes):**
- "Write the failing test" - step
- "Run it to make sure it fails" - step
- "Implement the minimal code to make the test pass" - step
- "Run the tests and make sure they pass" - step
- "Commit" - step

## Plan Document Header

**Every plan MUST start with this header:**

```markdown
# [Feature Name] Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** [One sentence describing what this builds]

**Architecture:** [2-3 sentences about approach]

**Tech Stack:** [Key technologies/libraries]

---
```

## Task Structure

````markdown
### Task N: [Component Name]

**Files:**
- Create: `exact/path/to/file.py`
- Modify: `exact/path/to/existing.py:123-145`
- Test: `tests/exact/path/to/test.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing test**

```python
def test_specific_behavior():
    result = function(input)
    assert result == expected
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run test to verify it fails**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: FAIL with "function not defined"

- [ ] **Step 3: Write minimal implementation**

```python
def function(input):
    return expected
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Run test to verify it passes**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: PASS

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add tests/path/test.py src/path/file.py
git commit -m "feat: add specific feature"
```
````

## Remember
- Exact file paths always
- Complete code in plan (not "add validation")
- Exact commands with expected output
- Reference relevant skills with @ syntax
- DRY, YAGNI, TDD, frequent commits

## Plan Review Loop

After writing the complete plan:

1. Dispatch a single plan-document-reviewer subagent (see plan-document-reviewer-prompt.md) with precisely crafted review context — never your session history. This keeps the reviewer focused on the plan, not your thought process.
   - Provide: path to the plan document, path to spec document
2. If ❌ Issues Found: fix the issues, re-dispatch reviewer for the whole plan
3. If ✅ Approved: proceed to execution handoff

**Review loop guidance:**
- Same agent that wrote the plan fixes it (preserves context)
- If loop exceeds 3 iterations, surface to human for guidance
- Reviewers are advisory — explain disagreements if you believe feedback is incorrect

## Execution Handoff

After saving the plan, offer execution choice:

**"Plan complete and saved to `docs/superpowers/plans/<filename>.md`. Two execution options:**

**1. Subagent-Driven (recommended)** - I dispatch a fresh subagent per task, review between tasks, fast iteration

**2. Inline Execution** - Execute tasks in this session using executing-plans, batch execution with checkpoints

**Which approach?"**

**If Subagent-Driven chosen:**
- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review

**If Inline Execution chosen:**
- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:executing-plans
- Batch execution with checkpoints for review

No changes to ViewModels, data layer, or navigation — pure UI transformation.

    65→) {
    66→    val colorScheme = if (darkTheme) DarkColorScheme else LightColorScheme
    67→
    68→    val view = LocalView.current
    69→    if (!view.isInEditMode) {
    70→        SideEffect {
    71→            val window = (view.context as Activity).window
    72→            window.statusBarColor = colorScheme.background.toArgb()
    73→            WindowCompat.getInsetsController(window, view).isAppearanceLightStatusBars = !darkTheme
    74→        }
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    MaterialTheme(
    78→        colorScheme = colorScheme,
    79→        content = content
    80→    )
    81→}
    82→

    55→sealed class Screen(

    59→    val unselectedIcon: ImageVector,

    96→sealed class DetailScreen(val route: String) {
    97→    data object SignIn : DetailScreen("signin?token={token}&code={code}") {
    98→        fun createRoute(token: String? = null, code: String? = null): String {
    99→            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
   100→            if (token != null) params.add("token=$token")
   101→            if (code != null) params.add("code=$code")
   102→            return if (params.isEmpty()) "signin" else "signin?${params.joinToString("&")}"
   103→        }
   104→    }
   105→    data object Compose : DetailScreen("compose?replyTo={replyTo}&quoteOf={quoteOf}") {
   106→        fun createRoute(replyTo: String? = null, quoteOf: String? = null): String {
   107→            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
   108→            if (replyTo != null) params.add("replyTo=$replyTo")
   109→            if (quoteOf != null) params.add("quoteOf=$quoteOf")
   110→            return if (params.isEmpty()) "compose" else "compose?${params.joinToString("&")}"
   111→        }
   112→    }
   113→    data object PostDetail : DetailScreen("post/{postId}") {
   114→        fun createRoute(postId: String) = "post/$postId"
   115→    }
   116→    data object Profile : DetailScreen("profile/{handle}") {
   117→        fun createRoute(handle: String) = "profile/$handle"
   118→    }
   119→}
   120→
   121→@Composable
   122→fun HackersPubApp(
   123→    deepLinkData: pub.hackers.android.DeepLinkData? = null,
   124→    viewModel: AppViewModel = hiltViewModel()
   125→) {
   126→    val navController = rememberNavController()
   127→    val isLoggedIn by viewModel.isLoggedIn.collectAsState(initial = false)
   128→
   129→    val fontSizePercent by viewModel.preferencesManager.fontSizePercent.collectAsState(initial = 100)
   130→
   131→    // Handle deep link for verification
   132→    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkData) {
   133→        deepLinkData?.let {
   134→            navController.navigate("signin?token=${it.token}&code=${it.code}")
   135→        }
   136→    }
   137→
   138→    ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler(preferencesManager = viewModel.preferencesManager) {
   139→    CompositionLocalProvider(LocalFontScale provides (fontSizePercent / 100f)) {
   140→
   141→    val bottomNavItems = if (isLoggedIn) {
   142→        listOf(Screen.Timeline, Screen.Notifications, Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   143→    } else {
   144→        listOf(Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   145→    }
   146→
   147→    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   148→    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
   149→    val showBottomBar = bottomNavItems.any { it.route == currentDestination?.route }
   150→
   151→    Scaffold(
   152→        bottomBar = {
   153→            if (showBottomBar) {
   154→                NavigationBar(
   155→                    modifier = Modifier
   156→                        .windowInsetsPadding(WindowInsets.navigationBars)
   157→                        .height(56.dp),
   158→                    windowInsets = WindowInsets(0)
   159→                ) {
   160→                    bottomNavItems.forEach { screen ->
   161→                        val selected = currentDestination?.hierarchy?.any { it.route == screen.route } == true
   162→                        NavigationBarItem(
   163→                            icon = {
   164→                                Icon(
   165→                                    if (selected) screen.selectedIcon else screen.unselectedIcon,
   166→                                    contentDescription = stringResource(screen.titleResId)
   167→                                )
   168→                            },
   169→                            label = null,
   170→                            selected = selected,
   171→                            onClick = {
   172→                                navController.navigate(screen.route) {
   173→                                    popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
   174→                                        saveState = true
   175→                                    }
   176→                                    launchSingleTop = true
   177→                                    restoreState = true
   178→                                }
   179→                            }
   180→                        )
   181→                    }
   182→                }
   183→            }
   184→        }
   185→    ) { innerPadding ->
   186→        NavHost(
   187→            navController = navController,
   188→            startDestination = if (isLoggedIn) Screen.Timeline.route else Screen.Explore.route,
   189→            modifier = Modifier.padding(innerPadding)
   190→        ) {
   191→            composable(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   192→                TimelineScreen(
   193→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   194→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   195→                    },
   196→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   197→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   198→                    },
   199→                    onComposeClick = { replyTo ->
   200→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo))
   201→                    },
   202→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   203→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   204→                    }
   205→                )
   206→            }
   207→
   208→            composable(Screen.Notifications.route) {
   209→                NotificationsScreen(
   210→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   211→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   212→                    },
   213→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   214→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   215→                    },
   216→                    onComposeClick = {
   217→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute())
   218→                    }
   219→                )
   220→            }
   221→
   222→            composable(Screen.Explore.route) {
   223→                ExploreScreen(
   224→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   225→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   226→                    },
   227→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   228→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   229→                    },
   230→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   231→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(postId))
   232→                    },
   233→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   234→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   235→                    },
   236→                    onComposeClick = {
   237→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute())
   238→                    },
   239→                    onSignInClick = {
   240→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   241→                    },
   242→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   243→                )
   244→            }
   245→
   246→            composable(Screen.Search.route) {
   247→                SearchScreen(
   248→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   249→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   250→                    },
   251→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   252→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   253→                    },
   254→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   255→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   256→                    },
   257→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   258→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   259→                    }
   260→                )
   261→            }
   262→
   263→            composable(Screen.Settings.route) {
   264→                SettingsScreen(
   265→                    onSignInClick = {
   266→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   267→                    },
   268→                    onSignOutComplete = {
   269→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Explore.route) {
   270→                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   271→                        }
   272→                    },
   273→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   274→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   275→                    },
   276→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   277→                )
   278→            }
   279→
   280→            composable(
   281→                route = DetailScreen.SignIn.route,
   282→                arguments = listOf(
   283→                    navArgument("token") {
   284→                        type = NavType.StringType
   285→                        nullable = true
   286→                        defaultValue = null
   287→                    },
   288→                    navArgument("code") {
   289→                        type = NavType.StringType
   290→                        nullable = true
   291→                        defaultValue = null
   292→                    }
   293→                )
   294→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   295→                val token = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("token")
   296→                val code = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("code")
   297→                SignInScreen(
   298→                    deepLinkToken = token,
   299→                    deepLinkCode = code,
   300→                    onSignInSuccess = {
   301→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   302→                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   303→                        }
   304→                    },
   305→                    onNavigateBack = {
   306→                        navController.popBackStack()
   307→                    }
   308→                )
   309→            }
   310→
   311→            composable(
   312→                route = DetailScreen.Compose.route,
   313→                arguments = listOf(
   314→                    navArgument("replyTo") {
   315→                        type = NavType.StringType
   316→                        nullable = true
   317→                        defaultValue = null
   318→                    },
   319→                    navArgument("quoteOf") {
   320→                        type = NavType.StringType
   321→                        nullable = true
   322→                        defaultValue = null
   323→                    }
   324→                )
   325→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   326→                val replyTo = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("replyTo")
   327→                val quoteOf = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("quoteOf")
   328→                ComposeScreen(
   329→                    replyToId = replyTo,
   330→                    quotedPostId = quoteOf,
   331→                    onPostSuccess = {
   332→                        navController.popBackStack()
   333→                    },
   334→                    onNavigateBack = {
   335→                        navController.popBackStack()
   336→                    }
   337→                )
   338→            }
   339→
   340→            composable(
   341→                route = DetailScreen.PostDetail.route,
   342→                arguments = listOf(navArgument("postId") { type = NavType.StringType })
   343→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   344→                val postId = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("postId") ?: return@composable
   345→                PostDetailScreen(
   346→                    postId = postId,
   347→                    onNavigateBack = {
   348→                        navController.popBackStack()
   349→                    },
   350→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   351→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   352→                    },
   353→                    onReplyClick = { id ->
   354→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = id))
   355→                    },
   356→                    onQuoteClick = { id ->
   357→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = id))
   358→                    },
   359→                    onPostClick = { id ->
   360→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(id))
   361→                    },
   362→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   363→                )
   364→            }
   365→
   366→            composable(
   367→                route = DetailScreen.Profile.route,
   368→                arguments = listOf(navArgument("handle") { type = NavType.StringType })
   369→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   370→                val handle = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("handle") ?: return@composable
   371→                ProfileScreen(
   372→                    handle = handle,
   373→                    onNavigateBack = {
   374→                        navController.popBackStack()
   375→                    },
   376→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   377→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   378→                    },
   379→                    onProfileClick = { profileHandle ->
   380→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(profileHandle))
   381→                    },
   382→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   383→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   384→                    },
   385→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   386→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   387→                    }
   388→                )
   389→            }
   390→        }
   391→    }
   392→    } // CompositionLocalProvider
   393→    } // ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler
   394→}
   395→

1→package pub.hackers.android
     2→
     3→import android.content.Intent
     4→import android.os.Bundle
     5→import androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
     6→import androidx.activity.compose.setContent
     7→import androidx.activity.enableEdgeToEdge
     8→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
     9→import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme
    10→import androidx.compose.material3.Surface
    11→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
    12→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
    13→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    15→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
    16→import pub.hackers.android.ui.HackersPubApp
    17→import pub.hackers.android.ui.theme.HackersPubTheme
    18→
    19→data class DeepLinkData(
    20→    val token: String,
    21→    val code: String
    22→)
    23→
    24→@AndroidEntryPoint
    25→class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
    26→
    27→    private var deepLinkData by mutableStateOf<DeepLinkData?>(null)
    28→
    29→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
    30→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
    31→        handleDeepLink(intent)
    32→        enableEdgeToEdge()
    33→        setContent {
    34→            HackersPubTheme {
    35→                Surface(
    36→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
    37→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background
    38→                ) {
    39→                    HackersPubApp(deepLinkData = deepLinkData)
    40→                }
    41→            }
    42→        }
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    override fun onNewIntent(intent: Intent) {
    46→        super.onNewIntent(intent)
    47→        handleDeepLink(intent)
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    private fun handleDeepLink(intent: Intent?) {
    51→        val data = intent?.data ?: return
    52→        if (data.scheme == "hackerspub" && data.host == "verify") {
    53→            val token = data.getQueryParameter("token")
    54→            val code = data.getQueryParameter("code")
    55→            if (token != null && code != null) {
    56→                deepLinkData = DeepLinkData(token = token, code = code)
    57→            }
    58→        }
    59→    }
    60→}
    61→

    64→@Composable
    65→fun PostCard(
    66→    post: Post,
    67→    onClick: () -> Unit,
    68→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    69→    onReplyClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    70→    onShareClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    71→    onQuoteClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    72→    onReactionClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    73→    onExternalShareClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    74→    onQuotedPostClick: ((String) -> Unit)? = null,
    75→    contentMaxLength: Int = 0,
    76→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
    77→) {
    78→    val displayPost = post.sharedPost ?: post
    79→    val isRepost = post.sharedPost != null
    80→
    81→    Card(
    82→        modifier = modifier
    83→            .fillMaxWidth()
    84→            .clickable(onClick = onClick),
    85→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
    86→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
    87→        ),
    88→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 0.dp)
    89→    ) {
    90→        Column(
    91→            modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
    92→        ) {
    93→            if (isRepost) {
    94→                Row(
    95→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
    96→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 8.dp)
    97→                ) {
    98→                    Icon(
    99→                        imageVector = Icons.Filled.Repeat,
   100→                        contentDescription = null,
   101→                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary,
   102→                        modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   103→                    )
   104→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   105→                    Text(
   106→                        text = "${post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle} ${stringResource(R.string.share)}d",
   107→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   108→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
   109→                    )
   110→                }
   111→            }
   112→
   113→            Row(
   114→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   115→            ) {
   116→                AsyncImage(
   117→                    model = displayPost.actor.avatarUrl,
   118→                    contentDescription = "Avatar",
   119→                    modifier = Modifier
   120→                        .size(48.dp)
   121→                        .clip(CircleShape)
   122→                        .clickable { onProfileClick(displayPost.actor.handle) },
   123→                    contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   124→                )
   125→
   126→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   127→
   128→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   129→                    Row(
   130→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   131→                    ) {
   132→                        Text(
   133→                            text = displayPost.actor.name ?: displayPost.actor.handle,
   134→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   135→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   136→                            maxLines = 1,
   137→                            overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
   138→                            modifier = Modifier
   139→                                .weight(1f, fill = false)
   140→                                .clickable { onProfileClick(displayPost.actor.handle) }
   141→                        )
   142→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   143→                        Text(
   144→                            text = formatRelativeTime(displayPost.published),
   145→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   146→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   147→                        )
   148→                    }
   149→
   150→                    Text(
   151→                        text = "@${displayPost.actor.handle}",
   152→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   153→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   154→                        maxLines = 1,
   155→                        overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   156→                    )
   157→                }
   158→            }
   159→
   160→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   161→
   162→            if (displayPost.typename == "Article") {
   163→                Text(
   164→                    text = "Article",
   165→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   166→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   167→                    modifier = Modifier
   168→                        .background(
   169→                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.1f),
   170→                            RoundedCornerShape(4.dp)
   171→                        )
   172→                        .padding(horizontal = 6.dp, vertical = 2.dp)
   173→                )
   174→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   175→            }
   176→
   177→            displayPost.name?.let { title ->
   178→                Text(
   179→                    text = title,
   180→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   181→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   182→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 4.dp)
   183→                )
   184→            }
   185→
   186→            val truncatedContent = if (contentMaxLength > 0 && displayPost.content.length > contentMaxLength) {
   187→                displayPost.content.take(contentMaxLength)
   188→            } else {
   189→                displayPost.content
   190→            }
   191→            val isTruncated = contentMaxLength > 0 && displayPost.content.length > contentMaxLength
   192→
   193→            HtmlContent(
   194→                html = truncatedContent,
   195→                maxLines = if (contentMaxLength > 0) Int.MAX_VALUE else 10,
   196→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   197→                onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   198→            )
   199→
   200→            if (isTruncated || (contentMaxLength == 0 && displayPost.content.length > 500)) {
   201→                Text(
   202→                    text = stringResource(R.string.read_more),
   203→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   204→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   205→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 4.dp)
   206→                )
   207→            }
   208→
   209→            if (displayPost.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   210→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   211→                MediaGrid(media = displayPost.media)
   212→            }
   213→
   214→            if (displayPost.quotedPost != null) {
   215→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   216→                QuotedPostPreview(
   217→                    post = displayPost.quotedPost!!,
   218→                    onClick = { onQuotedPostClick?.invoke(displayPost.quotedPost!!.id) },
   219→                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   220→                )
   221→            }
   222→
   223→            if (displayPost.reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   224→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   225→                FlowRow(
   226→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(6.dp),
   227→                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   228→                ) {
   229→                    displayPost.reactionGroups.forEach { group ->
   230→                        Surface(
   231→                            shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
   232→                            color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   233→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.15f)
   234→                            else
   235→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   236→                        ) {
   237→                            Row(
   238→                                modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
   239→                                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   240→                            ) {
   241→                                if (group.emoji != null) {
   242→                                    Text(
   243→                                        text = group.emoji,
   244→                                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall
   245→                                    )
   246→                                } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
   247→                                    AsyncImage(
   248→                                        model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
   249→                                        contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
   250→                                        modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp)
   251→                                    )
   252→                                }
   253→                                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   254→                                Text(
   255→                                    text = group.count.toString(),
   256→                                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   257→                                    color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   258→                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   259→                                    else
   260→                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   261→                                )
   262→                            }
   263→                        }
   264→                    }
   265→                }
   266→            }
   267→
   268→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   269→
   270→            EngagementBar(
   271→                post = displayPost,
   272→                onReplyClick = onReplyClick,
   273→                onShareClick = onShareClick,
   274→                onQuoteClick = onQuoteClick,
   275→                onReactionClick = onReactionClick,
   276→                onExternalShareClick = onExternalShareClick
   277→            )
   278→        }
   279→    }
   280→}

   282→@Composable
   283→private fun EngagementBar(
   284→    post: Post,
   285→    onReplyClick: (() -> Unit)?,
   286→    onShareClick: (() -> Unit)?,
   287→    onQuoteClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
   288→    onReactionClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
   289→    onExternalShareClick: (() -> Unit)? = null
   290→) {
   291→    Row(
   292→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   293→        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
   294→    ) {
   295→        EngagementButton(
   296→            icon = Icons.Outlined.ChatBubbleOutline,
   297→            count = post.engagementStats.replies,
   298→            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.replies),
   299→            onClick = onReplyClick
   300→        )
   301→
   302→        EngagementButton(
   303→            icon = if (post.viewerHasShared) Icons.Filled.Repeat else Icons.Outlined.Repeat,
   304→            count = post.engagementStats.shares,
   305→            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.shares),
   306→            onClick = onShareClick,
   307→            isActive = post.viewerHasShared
   308→        )
   309→
   310→        EngagementButton(
   311→            icon = if (post.reactionGroups.any { it.viewerHasReacted }) Icons.Filled.Favorite else Icons.Outlined.Favorite,
   312→            count = post.engagementStats.reactions,
   313→            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reactions),
   314→            onClick = onReactionClick,
   315→            isActive = post.reactionGroups.any { it.viewerHasReacted }
   316→        )
   317→
   318→        EngagementButton(
   319→            icon = Icons.Outlined.FormatQuote,
   320→            count = post.engagementStats.quotes,
   321→            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
   322→            onClick = onQuoteClick
   323→        )
   324→
   325→        if (onExternalShareClick != null) {
   326→            IconButton(
   327→                onClick = onExternalShareClick,
   328→                modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp)
   329→            ) {
   330→                Icon(
   331→                    imageVector = Icons.Outlined.Share,
   332→                    contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
   333→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   334→                    modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp)
   335→                )
   336→            }
   337→        }
   338→    }
   339→}

   341→@Composable
   342→private fun EngagementButton(
   343→    icon: androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector,
   344→    count: Int,
   345→    contentDescription: String,
   346→    onClick: (() -> Unit)?,
   347→    isActive: Boolean = false
   348→) {
   349→    Row(
   350→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   351→    ) {
   352→        IconButton(
   353→            onClick = { onClick?.invoke() },
   354→            enabled = onClick != null
   355→        ) {
   356→            Icon(
   357→                imageVector = icon,
   358→                contentDescription = contentDescription,
   359→                tint = if (isActive) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   360→                modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)

   362→        }

   364→            Text(
   365→                text = formatCount(count),
   366→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   367→                color = if (isActive) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   368→            )
   369→        }
   370→    }
   371→}
