   467→@Composable
   468→fun MediaGrid(media: List<pub.hackers.android.domain.model.Media>) {
   469→    when (media.size) {
   470→        1 -> {
   471→            MediaImage(
   472→                url = media[0].url,
   473→                alt = media[0].alt,
   474→                modifier = Modifier
   475→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   476→                    .height(200.dp)
   477→                    .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   478→            )
   479→        }
   480→        2 -> {
   481→            Row(
   482→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   483→            ) {
   484→                media.forEach { item ->
   485→                    MediaImage(
   486→                        url = item.url,
   487→                        alt = item.alt,
   488→                        modifier = Modifier
   489→                            .weight(1f)
   490→                            .height(150.dp)
   491→                            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   492→                    )
   493→                }
   494→            }
   495→        }
   496→        else -> {
   497→            Column(
   498→                verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   499→            ) {
   500→                Row(
   501→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   502→                ) {
   503→                    media.take(2).forEach { item ->
   504→                        MediaImage(
   505→                            url = item.url,
   506→                            alt = item.alt,
   507→                            modifier = Modifier
   508→                                .weight(1f)
   509→                                .height(100.dp)
   510→                                .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   511→                        )
   512→                    }
   513→                }
   514→                if (media.size > 2) {
   515→                    Row(
   516→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   517→                    ) {
   518→                        media.drop(2).take(2).forEach { item ->
   519→                            MediaImage(
   520→                                url = item.url,
   521→                                alt = item.alt,
   522→                                modifier = Modifier
   523→                                    .weight(1f)
   524→                                    .height(100.dp)
   525→                                    .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   526→                            )
   527→                        }
   528→                    }
   529→                }
   530→            }
   531→        }
   532→    }
   533→}
   534→
   535→@Composable
   536→private fun MediaImage(
   537→    url: String,
   538→    alt: String?,
   539→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
   540→) {
   541→    val context = LocalContext.current
   542→    var showMenu by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   543→
   544→    Box {
   545→        AsyncImage(
   546→            model = url,
   547→            contentDescription = alt,
   548→            modifier = modifier.combinedClickable(
   549→                onClick = {
   550→                    // Open image in browser/viewer
   551→                    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse(url))
   552→                    context.startActivity(intent)
   553→                },
   554→                onLongClick = { showMenu = true }
   555→            ),
   556→            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   557→        )
   558→
   559→        DropdownMenu(
   560→            expanded = showMenu,
   561→            onDismissRequest = { showMenu = false }
   562→        ) {
   563→            DropdownMenuItem(
   564→                text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.share)) },
   565→                onClick = {
   566→                    showMenu = false
   567→                    val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   568→                        action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   569→                        putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, url)
   570→                        type = "text/plain"
   571→                    }
   572→                    context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   573→                }
   574→            )
   575→            DropdownMenuItem(
   576→                text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.open_in_browser)) },
   577→                onClick = {
   578→                    showMenu = false
   579→                    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse(url))
   580→                    context.startActivity(intent)
   581→                }
   582→            )
   583→        }
   584→    }
   585→}
   586→
   587→private fun formatRelativeTime(instant: Instant): String {
   588→    val now = Instant.now()
   589→    val duration = Duration.between(instant, now)
   590→
   591→    return when {
   592→        duration.toMinutes() < 1 -> "now"
   593→        duration.toMinutes() < 60 -> "${duration.toMinutes()}m"
   594→        duration.toHours() < 24 -> "${duration.toHours()}h"
   595→        duration.toDays() < 7 -> "${duration.toDays()}d"
   596→        duration.toDays() < 30 -> "${duration.toDays() / 7}w"
   597→        duration.toDays() < 365 -> "${duration.toDays() / 30}mo"
   598→        else -> "${duration.toDays() / 365}y"
   599→    }
   600→}
   601→
   602→private fun formatCount(count: Int): String {
   603→    return when {
   604→        count < 1000 -> count.toString()
   605→        count < 1_000_000 -> String.format("%.1fK", count / 1000.0)
   606→        else -> String.format("%.1fM", count / 1_000_000.0)
   607→    }
   608→}

    32→@Composable
    33→fun MentionAutocomplete(
    34→    suggestions: List<Actor>,
    35→    isLoading: Boolean,
    36→    onSuggestionSelected: (Actor) -> Unit,
    37→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
    38→) {
    39→    if (suggestions.isEmpty() && !isLoading) return
    40→
    41→    Surface(
    42→        modifier = modifier
    43→            .fillMaxWidth()
    44→            .heightIn(max = 200.dp),
    45→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(8.dp),
    46→        shadowElevation = 4.dp,
    47→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
    48→    ) {
    49→        if (isLoading && suggestions.isEmpty()) {
    50→            Box(
    51→                modifier = Modifier
    52→                    .fillMaxWidth()
    53→                    .padding(16.dp),
    54→                contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
    55→            ) {
    56→                CircularProgressIndicator(modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp))
    57→            }
    58→        } else {
    59→            LazyColumn {
    60→                items(
    61→                    items = suggestions,
    62→                    key = { it.id }
    63→                ) { actor ->
    64→                    MentionSuggestionItem(
    65→                        actor = actor,
    66→                        onClick = { onSuggestionSelected(actor) }
    67→                    )
    68→                }
    69→            }
    70→        }
    71→    }
    72→}

    74→@Composable
    75→private fun MentionSuggestionItem(
    76→    actor: Actor,
    77→    onClick: () -> Unit
    78→) {
    79→    Row(
    80→        modifier = Modifier
    81→            .fillMaxWidth()
    82→            .clickable(onClick = onClick)
    83→            .padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 8.dp),
    84→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
    85→    ) {
    86→        AsyncImage(
    87→            model = actor.avatarUrl,
    88→            contentDescription = null,
    89→            modifier = Modifier
    90→                .size(36.dp)
    91→                .clip(CircleShape),
    92→            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
    93→        )
    94→
    95→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
    96→
    97→        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
    98→            Text(
    99→                text = actor.name ?: actor.handle.substringBefore("@"),
   100→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   101→                fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
   102→                maxLines = 1,
   103→                overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   104→            )
   105→            Text(
   106→                text = "@${actor.handle}",
   107→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   108→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   109→                maxLines = 1,
   110→                overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   111→            )
   112→        }
   113→    }
   114→}

    36→import pub.hackers.android.R
    37→import pub.hackers.android.domain.model.ReactionGroup
    38→
    39→val SUPPORTED_REACTION_EMOJIS = listOf("❤️", "🎉", "😂", "😲", "🤔", "😢", "👀")
    40→
    41→@Composable
    42→fun ReactionPicker(
    43→    reactionGroups: List<ReactionGroup>,
    44→    isSubmitting: Boolean,
    45→    onEmojiSelect: (String) -> Unit,
    46→    onClose: () -> Unit
    47→) {
    48→    val groupsByEmoji = reactionGroups
    49→        .filter { it.emoji != null }
    50→        .associateBy { it.emoji!! }
    51→
    52→    val selectedGroups = reactionGroups
    53→        .filter { it.viewerHasReacted }
    54→        .sortedWith(compareBy { group ->
    55→            group.emoji?.let { SUPPORTED_REACTION_EMOJIS.indexOf(it).takeIf { i -> i >= 0 } ?: Int.MAX_VALUE }
    56→                ?: Int.MAX_VALUE
    57→        })
    58→
    59→    Column(
    60→        modifier = Modifier
    61→            .fillMaxWidth()
    62→            .padding(16.dp)
    63→    ) {
    64→        Row(
    65→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
    66→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
    67→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
    68→        ) {
    69→            Text(
    70→                text = stringResource(R.string.reactions),
    71→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    72→                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
    73→            )
    74→            IconButton(
    75→                onClick = onClose,
    76→                modifier = Modifier
    77→                    .size(30.dp)
    78→                    .clip(CircleShape)
    79→                    .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant)
    80→            ) {
    81→                Icon(
    82→                    imageVector = Icons.Filled.Close,
    83→                    contentDescription = "Close",
    84→                    modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp)
    85→                )
    86→            }
    87→        }
    88→
    89→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
    90→
    91→        LazyVerticalGrid(
    92→            columns = GridCells.Fixed(7),
    93→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp),
    94→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp),
    95→            modifier = Modifier.height(80.dp)
    96→        ) {
    97→            items(SUPPORTED_REACTION_EMOJIS) { emoji ->
    98→                val existingGroup = groupsByEmoji[emoji]
    99→
   100→                Column(
   101→                    horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
   102→                    modifier = Modifier
   103→                        .clip(RoundedCornerShape(8.dp))
   104→                        .background(
   105→                            if (existingGroup?.viewerHasReacted == true)
   106→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.2f)
   107→                            else
   108→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
   109→                        )
   110→                        .clickable(enabled = !isSubmitting) { onEmojiSelect(emoji) }
   111→                        .padding(vertical = 8.dp)
   112→                ) {
   113→                    Text(
   114→                        text = emoji,
   115→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall
   116→                    )
   117→                    Text(
   118→                        text = (existingGroup?.count ?: 0).toString(),
   119→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   120→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   121→                    )
   122→                }
   123→            }
   124→        }
   125→
   126→        if (selectedGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   127→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   128→            HorizontalDivider()
   129→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   130→
   131→            Row(
   132→                modifier = Modifier.horizontalScroll(rememberScrollState()),
   133→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   134→            ) {
   135→                selectedGroups.forEach { group ->
   136→                    Row(
   137→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   138→                        modifier = Modifier
   139→                            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(50))
   140→                            .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.2f))
   141→                            .clickable(enabled = !isSubmitting && group.emoji != null) {
   142→                                group.emoji?.let { onEmojiSelect(it) }
   143→                            }
   144→                            .padding(horizontal = 10.dp, vertical = 6.dp)
   145→                    ) {
   146→                        if (group.emoji != null) {
   147→                            Text(text = group.emoji)
   148→                        } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
   149→                            AsyncImage(
   150→                                model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
   151→                                contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
   152→                                modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   153→                            )
   154→                        }
   155→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(6.dp))
   156→                        Text(
   157→                            text = group.count.toString(),
   158→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium
   159→                        )
   160→                    }
   161→                }
   162→            }
   163→        }
   164→    }
   165→}
   166→

    67→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    68→@Composable
    69→fun NotificationsScreen(
    70→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    71→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    72→    onComposeClick: () -> Unit = {},
    73→    viewModel: NotificationsViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    74→) {
    75→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    76→    val listState = rememberLazyListState()
    77→    val lifecycleOwner = LocalLifecycleOwner.current
    78→
    79→    DisposableEffect(lifecycleOwner) {
    80→        val observer = LifecycleEventObserver { _, event ->
    81→            if (event == Lifecycle.Event.ON_RESUME) {
    82→                viewModel.refreshIfStale()
    83→            }
    84→        }
    85→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.addObserver(observer)
    86→        onDispose { lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.removeObserver(observer) }
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    val shouldLoadMore by remember {
    90→        derivedStateOf {
    91→            val lastVisibleItem = listState.layoutInfo.visibleItemsInfo.lastOrNull()
    92→            lastVisibleItem != null && lastVisibleItem.index >= listState.layoutInfo.totalItemsCount - 3
    93→        }
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    LaunchedEffect(shouldLoadMore) {
    97→        if (shouldLoadMore && uiState.hasNextPage && !uiState.isLoadingMore) {
    98→            viewModel.loadMore()
    99→        }
   100→    }
   101→
   102→    Scaffold(
   103→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   104→        topBar = {
   105→            CompactTopBar(title = stringResource(R.string.nav_notifications))
   106→        },
   107→        floatingActionButton = {
   108→            FloatingActionButton(onClick = onComposeClick) {
   109→                Icon(
   110→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.Add,
   111→                    contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.compose)
   112→                )
   113→            }
   114→        }
   115→    ) { paddingValues ->
   116→        Box(
   117→            modifier = Modifier
   118→                .fillMaxSize()
   119→                .padding(paddingValues)
   120→        ) {
   121→            when {
   122→                uiState.isLoading && uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   123→                    FullScreenLoading()
   124→                }
   125→                uiState.error != null && uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   126→                    ErrorMessage(
   127→                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   128→                        onRetry = { viewModel.refresh() }
   129→                    )
   130→                }
   131→                uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   132→                    ErrorMessage(
   133→                        message = stringResource(R.string.no_notifications),
   134→                        icon = Icons.Outlined.NotificationsOff
   135→                    )
   136→                }
   137→                else -> {
   138→                    PullToRefreshBox(
   139→                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   140→                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   141→                    ) {
   142→                        LazyColumn(state = listState) {
   143→                            items(
   144→                                items = uiState.notifications,
   145→                                key = { it.id }
   146→                            ) { notification ->
   147→                                NotificationItem(
   148→                                    notification = notification,
   149→                                    onPostClick = onPostClick,
   150→                                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   151→                                )
   152→                                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   153→                            }
   154→
   155→                            if (uiState.isLoadingMore) {
   156→                                item {
   157→                                    LoadingItem()
   158→                                }
   159→                            }
   160→                        }
   161→                    }
   162→                }
   163→            }
   164→        }
   165→    }
   166→}
   167→
   168→@Composable
   169→private fun NotificationItem(
   170→    notification: Notification,
   171→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   172→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit
   173→) {
   174→    val (icon, iconColor, actionText) = when (notification) {
   175→        is Notification.Follow -> Triple(
   176→            Icons.Default.PersonAdd,
   177→            Color(0xFF4CAF50),
   178→            stringResource(R.string.notification_follow)
   179→        )
   180→        is Notification.Mention -> Triple(
   181→            Icons.Outlined.AlternateEmail,
   182→            Color(0xFF2196F3),
   183→            stringResource(R.string.notification_mention)
   184→        )
   185→        is Notification.Reply -> Triple(
   186→            Icons.Default.Reply,
   187→            Color(0xFF9C27B0),
   188→            stringResource(R.string.notification_reply)
   189→        )
   190→        is Notification.Quote -> Triple(
   191→            Icons.Default.FormatQuote,
   192→            Color(0xFFFF9800),
   193→            stringResource(R.string.notification_quote)
   194→        )
   195→        is Notification.Share -> Triple(
   196→            Icons.Default.Repeat,
   197→            Color(0xFF00BCD4),
   198→            stringResource(R.string.notification_share)
   199→        )
   200→        is Notification.React -> Triple(
   201→            Icons.Default.Favorite,
   202→            Color(0xFFE91E63),
   203→            notification.emoji?.let { "$it" } ?: stringResource(R.string.notification_react)
   204→        )
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    val post = when (notification) {
   208→        is Notification.Mention -> notification.post
   209→        is Notification.Reply -> notification.post
   210→        is Notification.Quote -> notification.post
   211→        is Notification.Share -> notification.post
   212→        is Notification.React -> notification.post
   213→        else -> null
   214→    }
   215→
   216→    val actor = notification.actors.firstOrNull()
   217→
   218→    val customEmoji = (notification as? Notification.React)?.customEmoji
   219→    val emojiChar = (notification as? Notification.React)?.emoji
   220→
   221→    Row(
   222→        modifier = Modifier
   223→            .fillMaxWidth()
   224→            .clickable {
   225→                when {
   226→                    post != null -> onPostClick(post.id)
   227→                    actor != null -> onProfileClick(actor.handle)
   228→                }
   229→            }
   230→            .padding(12.dp),
   231→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.Top
   232→    ) {
   233→        if (customEmoji != null) {
   234→            AsyncImage(
   235→                model = customEmoji.imageUrl,
   236→                contentDescription = customEmoji.name,
   237→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp)
   238→            )
   239→        } else if (emojiChar != null) {
   240→            Text(
   241→                text = emojiChar,
   242→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp),
   243→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium
   244→            )
   245→        } else {
   246→            Icon(
   247→                imageVector = icon,
   248→                contentDescription = null,
   249→                tint = iconColor,
   250→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp)
   251→            )
   252→        }
   253→
   254→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   255→
   256→        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   257→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   258→                if (actor != null) {
   259→                    AsyncImage(
   260→                        model = actor.avatarUrl,
   261→                        contentDescription = null,
   262→                        modifier = Modifier
   263→                            .size(32.dp)
   264→                            .clip(CircleShape)
   265→                            .clickable { onProfileClick(actor.handle) },
   266→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   267→                    )
   268→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   269→                }
   270→
   271→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   272→                    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   273→                        val actorDisplayName = actor?.name ?: actor?.handle ?: "Someone"
   274→                        val allActors = notification.actors
   275→                        val actorLabel = when {
   276→                            allActors.size == 2 -> "$actorDisplayName and ${allActors[1].name ?: allActors[1].handle}"
   277→                            allActors.size > 2 -> "$actorDisplayName and ${allActors.size - 1} others"
   278→                            else -> actorDisplayName
   279→                        }
   280→                        Text(
   281→                            text = actorLabel,
   282→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   283→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   284→                            maxLines = 1,
   285→                            overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
   286→                            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f, fill = false)
   287→                        )
   288→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   289→                        Text(
   290→                            text = actionText,
   291→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   292→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   293→                        )
   294→                    }
   295→                    Text(
   296→                        text = formatRelativeTime(notification.created),
   297→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   298→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   299→                    )
   300→                }
   301→            }
   302→
   303→            val shouldHavePost = notification is Notification.Mention ||
   304→                notification is Notification.Reply ||
   305→                notification is Notification.Quote ||
   306→                notification is Notification.Share ||
   307→                notification is Notification.React
   308→
   309→            if (post != null) {
   310→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp))
   311→                HtmlContent(
   312→                    html = post.content,
   313→                    maxLines = 3,
   314→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   315→                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   316→                )
   317→            } else if (shouldHavePost) {
   318→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp))
   319→                Text(
   320→                    text = stringResource(R.string.notification_post_unavailable),
   321→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   322→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.6f),
   323→                    fontStyle = androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontStyle.Italic
   324→                )
   325→            }
   326→        }
   327→    }
   328→}
   329→
   330→private fun formatRelativeTime(instant: Instant): String {
   331→    val now = Instant.now()
   332→    val duration = Duration.between(instant, now)
   333→
   334→    return when {
   335→        duration.toMinutes() < 1 -> "now"
   336→        duration.toMinutes() < 60 -> "${duration.toMinutes()}m"
   337→        duration.toHours() < 24 -> "${duration.toHours()}h"
   338→        duration.toDays() < 7 -> "${duration.toDays()}d"
   339→        else -> "${duration.toDays() / 7}w"
   340→    }
   341→}
   342→

    56→@Composable
    57→fun SearchScreen(
    58→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    59→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    60→    onReplyClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    61→    onQuoteClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    62→    viewModel: SearchViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    63→) {
    64→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    65→    val keyboardController = LocalSoftwareKeyboardController.current
    66→    val context = LocalContext.current
    67→
    68→    Scaffold(
    69→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
    70→        topBar = {
    71→            CompactTopBar(title = stringResource(R.string.nav_search))
    72→        }
    73→    ) { paddingValues ->
    74→        Column(
    75→            modifier = Modifier
    76→                .fillMaxSize()
    77→                .padding(paddingValues)
    78→        ) {
    79→            OutlinedTextField(
    80→                value = uiState.query,
    81→                onValueChange = { viewModel.updateQuery(it) },
    82→                placeholder = { Text(stringResource(R.string.search_hint)) },
    83→                leadingIcon = {
    84→                    Icon(
    85→                        imageVector = Icons.Default.Search,
    86→                        contentDescription = null
    87→                    )
    88→                },
    89→                trailingIcon = {
    90→                    if (uiState.query.isNotEmpty()) {
    91→                        IconButton(onClick = { viewModel.clearSearch() }) {
    92→                            Icon(
    93→                                imageVector = Icons.Default.Clear,
    94→                                contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.cancel)
    95→                            )
    96→                        }
    97→                    }
    98→                },
    99→                singleLine = true,
   100→                keyboardOptions = KeyboardOptions(imeAction = ImeAction.Search),
   101→                keyboardActions = KeyboardActions(
   102→                    onSearch = {
   103→                        viewModel.search()
   104→                        keyboardController?.hide()
   105→                    }
   106→                ),
   107→                modifier = Modifier
   108→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   109→                    .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 8.dp)
   110→            )
   111→
   112→            Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
   113→                when {
   114→                    uiState.isLoading -> {
   115→                        FullScreenLoading()
   116→                    }
   117→                    uiState.error != null -> {
   118→                        ErrorMessage(
   119→                            message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   120→                            onRetry = { viewModel.search() }
   121→                        )
   122→                    }
   123→                    uiState.hasSearched && uiState.posts.isEmpty() && uiState.actors.isEmpty() && uiState.resolvedObjectUrl == null -> {
   124→                        ErrorMessage(
   125→                            message = stringResource(R.string.no_results) + "\n" + stringResource(R.string.no_results_description),
   126→                            icon = Icons.Filled.Search
   127→                        )
   128→                    }
   129→                    uiState.posts.isNotEmpty() || uiState.resolvedObjectUrl != null || uiState.actors.isNotEmpty() -> {
   130→                        LazyColumn {
   131→                            if (uiState.resolvedObjectUrl != null) {
   132→                                item {
   133→                                    ListItem(
   134→                                        headlineContent = {
   135→                                            Text(
   136→                                                text = uiState.resolvedObjectUrl!!,
   137→                                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   138→                                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   139→                                            )
   140→                                        },
   141→                                        leadingContent = {
   142→                                            Icon(
   143→                                                imageVector = Icons.Filled.OpenInBrowser,
   144→                                                contentDescription = null,
   145→                                                tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   146→                                            )
   147→                                        },
   148→                                        modifier = Modifier.clickable {
   149→                                            val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse(uiState.resolvedObjectUrl))
   150→                                            context.startActivity(intent)
   151→                                        }
   152→                                    )
   153→                                    HorizontalDivider()
   154→                                }
   155→                            }
   156→
   157→                            if (uiState.actors.isNotEmpty()) {
   158→                                item {
   159→                                    Text(
   160→                                        text = stringResource(R.string.search_accounts),
   161→                                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall,
   162→                                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   163→                                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 8.dp)
   164→                                    )
   165→                                }
   166→                                items(
   167→                                    items = uiState.actors,
   168→                                    key = { "actor-${it.id}" }
   169→                                ) { actor ->
   170→                                    ListItem(
   171→                                        headlineContent = {
   172→                                            Text(
   173→                                                text = actor.name ?: actor.handle,
   174→                                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   175→                                            )
   176→                                        },
   177→                                        supportingContent = {
   178→                                            Text(
   179→                                                text = "@${actor.handle}",
   180→                                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   181→                                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   182→                                            )
   183→                                        },
   184→                                        leadingContent = {
   185→                                            AsyncImage(
   186→                                                model = actor.avatarUrl,
   187→                                                contentDescription = null,
   188→                                                modifier = Modifier
   189→                                                    .size(40.dp)
   190→                                                    .clip(CircleShape),
   191→                                                contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   192→                                            )
   193→                                        },
   194→                                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onProfileClick(actor.handle) }
   195→                                    )
   196→                                    HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   197→                                }
   198→                            }
   199→
   200→                            if (uiState.posts.isNotEmpty() && (uiState.actors.isNotEmpty() || uiState.resolvedObjectUrl != null)) {
   201→                                item {
   202→                                    Text(
   203→                                        text = stringResource(R.string.search_posts),
   204→                                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall,
   205→                                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   206→                                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 8.dp)
   207→                                    )
   208→                                }
   209→                            }
   210→                            items(
   211→                                items = uiState.posts,
   212→                                key = { it.id }
   213→                            ) { post ->
   214→                                PostCard(
   215→                                    post = post,
   216→                                    onClick = { onPostClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   217→                                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   218→                                    onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   219→                                    onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   220→                                    onReactionClick = { onPostClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   221→                                    onExternalShareClick = {
   222→                                        val displayPost = post.sharedPost ?: post
   223→                                        val shareUrl = displayPost.url ?: displayPost.iri
   224→                                        if (shareUrl != null) {
   225→                                            val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   226→                                                action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   227→                                                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   228→                                                type = "text/plain"
   229→                                            }
   230→                                            context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   231→                                        }
   232→                                    },
   233→                                    onQuotedPostClick = onPostClick
   234→                                )
   235→                                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   236→                            }
   237→                        }
   238→                    }
   239→                    else -> {
   240→                        if (uiState.recentSearches.isNotEmpty()) {
   241→                            LazyColumn {
   242→                                item {
   243→                                    Row(
   244→                                        modifier = Modifier
   245→                                            .fillMaxWidth()
   246→                                            .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 8.dp),
   247→                                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   248→                                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   249→                                    ) {
   250→                                        Text(
   251→                                            text = stringResource(R.string.search_recent),
   252→                                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall,
   253→                                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   254→                                        )
   255→                                        TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.clearRecentSearches() }) {
   256→                                            Text(stringResource(R.string.search_clear_recent))
   257→                                        }
   258→                                    }
   259→                                }
   260→                                items(
   261→                                    items = uiState.recentSearches,
   262→                                    key = { "recent-$it" }
   263→                                ) { query ->
   264→                                    ListItem(
   265→                                        headlineContent = { Text(query) },
   266→                                        leadingContent = {
   267→                                            Icon(
   268→                                                imageVector = Icons.Filled.History,
   269→                                                contentDescription = null,
   270→                                                tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   271→                                            )
   272→                                        },
   273→                                        trailingContent = {
   274→                                            IconButton(onClick = { viewModel.removeRecentSearch(query) }) {
   275→                                                Icon(
   276→                                                    imageVector = Icons.Filled.Clear,
   277→                                                    contentDescription = "Remove",
   278→                                                    modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp)
   279→                                                )
   280→                                            }
   281→                                        },
   282→                                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { viewModel.selectRecentSearch(query) }
   283→                                    )
   284→                                }
   285→                            }
   286→                        } else {
   287→                            Box(
   288→                                modifier = Modifier
   289→                                    .fillMaxSize()
   290→                                    .padding(32.dp)
   291→                            ) {
   292→                                Text(
   293→                                    text = stringResource(R.string.search_hint),
   294→                                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   295→                                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   296→                                )
   297→                            }
   298→                        }
   299→                    }
   300→                }
   301→            }
   302→        }
   303→    }
   304→}
   305→

    54→@Composable
    55→fun SettingsScreen(
    56→    onSignInClick: () -> Unit,
    57→    onSignOutComplete: () -> Unit,
    58→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    59→    isLoggedIn: Boolean,
    60→    viewModel: SettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    61→) {
    62→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    63→    val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
    64→    var showSignOutDialog by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    65→    var showClearCacheDialog by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    66→
    67→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isSignedOut) {
    68→        if (uiState.isSignedOut) {
    69→            onSignOutComplete()
    70→        }
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.message) {
    74→        uiState.message?.let {
    75→            snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(it)
    76→            viewModel.clearMessage()
    77→        }
    78→    }
    79→
    80→    if (showClearCacheDialog) {
    81→        AlertDialog(
    82→            onDismissRequest = { showClearCacheDialog = false },
    83→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.clear_cache_confirm_title)) },
    84→            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.clear_cache_confirm_message)) },
    85→            confirmButton = {
    86→                TextButton(
    87→                    onClick = {
    88→                        showClearCacheDialog = false
    89→                        viewModel.clearCache()
    90→                    }
    91→                ) {
    92→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.clear_cache_confirm_action))
    93→                }
    94→            },
    95→            dismissButton = {
    96→                TextButton(onClick = { showClearCacheDialog = false }) {
    97→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
    98→                }
    99→            }
   100→        )
   101→    }
   102→
   103→    if (showSignOutDialog) {
   104→        AlertDialog(
   105→            onDismissRequest = { showSignOutDialog = false },
   106→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.sign_out)) },
   107→            text = { Text("Are you sure you want to sign out?") },
   108→            confirmButton = {
   109→                TextButton(
   110→                    onClick = {
   111→                        showSignOutDialog = false
   112→                        viewModel.signOut()
   113→                    }
   114→                ) {
   115→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.sign_out))
   116→                }
   117→            },
   118→            dismissButton = {
   119→                TextButton(onClick = { showSignOutDialog = false }) {
   120→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   121→                }
   122→            }
   123→        )
   124→    }
   125→
   126→    Scaffold(
   127→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   128→        topBar = {
   129→            CompactTopBar(title = stringResource(R.string.settings))
   130→        },
   131→        snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) }
   132→    ) { paddingValues ->
   133→        Column(
   134→            modifier = Modifier
   135→                .fillMaxSize()
   136→                .padding(paddingValues)
   137→                .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
   138→        ) {
   139→            if (isLoggedIn) {
   140→                Row(
   141→                    modifier = Modifier
   142→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   143→                        .clickable {
   144→                            uiState.userHandle?.let { onProfileClick(it) }
   145→                        }
   146→                        .padding(16.dp),
   147→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   148→                ) {
   149→                    AsyncImage(
   150→                        model = uiState.userAvatar,
   151→                        contentDescription = null,
   152→                        modifier = Modifier
   153→                            .size(64.dp)
   154→                            .clip(CircleShape),
   155→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   156→                    )
   157→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(16.dp))
   158→                    Column {
   159→                        Text(
   160→                            text = uiState.userName ?: "",
   161→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium
   162→                        )
   163→                        Text(
   164→                            text = "@${uiState.userHandle ?: ""}",
   165→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   166→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   167→                        )
   168→                    }
   169→                }
   170→                HorizontalDivider()
   171→            }
   172→
   173→            if (isLoggedIn) {
   174→                ListItem(
   175→                    headlineContent = { Text(stringResource(R.string.sign_out)) },

   179→                            contentDescription = null,
   180→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   181→                        )
   182→                    },
   183→                    modifier = Modifier.clickable { showSignOutDialog = true }
   184→                )
   185→            } else {
   186→                ListItem(

   289→
   290→            ListItem(

   300→            ListItem(

   309→

   320→

   342→            TimelineMaxLengthSetting(
   343→                currentValue = uiState.timelineMaxLength,
   344→                onValueChange = { viewModel.setTimelineMaxLength(it) }
   345→            )
   346→        }
   347→    }
   348→}
   349→
   350→@Composable
   351→private fun TimelineMaxLengthSetting(
   352→    currentValue: Int,
   353→    onValueChange: (Int) -> Unit
   354→) {
   355→    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   356→    val options = listOf(300, 500, 700, 1000, 0)
   357→
   358→    ListItem(
   359→        headlineContent = { Text(stringResource(R.string.settings_timeline_max_length)) },
   360→        trailingContent = {
   361→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   362→                Text(
   363→                    text = if (currentValue == 0) stringResource(R.string.settings_timeline_unlimited) else currentValue.toString(),
   364→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   365→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   366→                    modifier = Modifier.clickable { expanded = true }
   367→                )
   368→
   369→                DropdownMenu(
   370→                    expanded = expanded,
   371→                    onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
   372→                ) {
   373→                    options.forEach { value ->
   374→                        DropdownMenuItem(
   375→                            text = {
   376→                                Text(
   377→                                    if (value == 0) stringResource(R.string.settings_timeline_unlimited) else value.toString()
   378→                                )
   379→                            },
   380→                            onClick = {
   381→                                onValueChange(value)
   382→                                expanded = false
   383→                            }
   384→                        )
   385→                    }
   386→                }
   387→            }
   388→        }
   389→    )
   390→}

    68→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    69→@Composable
    70→fun ProfileScreen(
    71→    handle: String,
    72→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    73→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    74→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    75→    onReplyClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    76→    onQuoteClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    77→    viewModel: ProfileViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    78→) {
    79→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    80→    val listState = rememberLazyListState()
    81→    val context = LocalContext.current
    82→
    83→    val shouldLoadMore by remember {
    84→        derivedStateOf {
    85→            val lastVisibleItem = listState.layoutInfo.visibleItemsInfo.lastOrNull()
    86→            lastVisibleItem != null && lastVisibleItem.index >= listState.layoutInfo.totalItemsCount - 3
    87→        }
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    LaunchedEffect(shouldLoadMore) {
    91→        if (shouldLoadMore && uiState.hasNextPage && !uiState.isLoadingMore) {
    92→            viewModel.loadMore()
    93→        }
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    if (uiState.actionError != null) {
    97→        AlertDialog(
    98→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissActionError() },
    99→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.action_error)) },
   100→            text = { Text(uiState.actionError ?: "") },
   101→            confirmButton = {
   102→                TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.dismissActionError() }) {
   103→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.ok))
   104→                }
   105→            }
   106→        )
   107→    }
   108→
   109→    Scaffold(
   110→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   111→        topBar = {
   112→            CompactTopBar(
   113→                title = uiState.actor?.name ?: handle,
   114→                navigationIcon = {
   115→                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   116→                        Icon(
   117→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
   118→                            contentDescription = "Back"
   119→                        )
   120→                    }
   121→                },
   122→                actions = {
   123→                    if (uiState.actor != null) {
   124→                        IconButton(onClick = {
   125→                            val profileHandle = uiState.actor!!.handle
   126→                            val normalizedHandle = if (profileHandle.startsWith("@")) profileHandle else "@$profileHandle"
   127→                            val profileUrl = "https://hackers.pub/$normalizedHandle"
   128→                            val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   129→                                action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   130→                                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, profileUrl)
   131→                                type = "text/plain"
   132→                            }
   133→                            context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   134→                        }) {
   135→                            Icon(
   136→                                imageVector = Icons.Outlined.Share,
   137→                                contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share)
   138→                            )
   139→                        }
   140→                    }
   141→                    if (!uiState.isViewer && uiState.actor != null) {
   142→                        ProfileActionMenu(
   143→                            followsViewer = uiState.followsViewer,
   144→                            viewerBlocks = uiState.viewerBlocks,
   145→                            isPerformingAction = uiState.isPerformingAction,
   146→                            onRemoveFollower = { viewModel.removeFollower() },
   147→                            onBlock = { viewModel.blockActor() },
   148→                            onUnblock = { viewModel.unblockActor() }
   149→                        )
   150→                    }
   151→                }
   152→            )
   153→        }
   154→    ) { paddingValues ->
   155→        Box(
   156→            modifier = Modifier
   157→                .fillMaxSize()
   158→                .padding(paddingValues)
   159→        ) {
   160→            when {
   161→                uiState.isLoading && uiState.actor == null -> {
   162→                    FullScreenLoading()
   163→                }
   164→                uiState.error != null && uiState.actor == null -> {
   165→                    ErrorMessage(
   166→                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   167→                        onRetry = { viewModel.loadProfile(handle) }
   168→                    )
   169→                }
   170→                uiState.actor != null -> {
   171→                    PullToRefreshBox(
   172→                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   173→                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   174→                    ) {
   175→                        LazyColumn(state = listState) {
   176→                            item {
   177→                                ProfileHeader(
   178→                                    avatarUrl = uiState.actor!!.avatarUrl,
   179→                                    name = uiState.actor!!.name,
   180→                                    handle = uiState.actor!!.handle,
   181→                                    bio = uiState.bio,
   182→                                    isViewer = uiState.isViewer,
   183→                                    viewerFollows = uiState.viewerFollows,
   184→                                    followsViewer = uiState.followsViewer,
   185→                                    viewerBlocks = uiState.viewerBlocks,
   186→                                    isPerformingAction = uiState.isPerformingAction,
   187→                                    onFollowClick = { viewModel.followActor() },
   188→                                    onUnfollowClick = { viewModel.unfollowActor() },
   189→                                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   190→                                )
   191→                                HorizontalDivider()
   192→                            }
   193→
   194→                            items(
   195→                                items = uiState.posts,
   196→                                key = { it.id }
   197→                            ) { post ->
   198→                                PostCard(
   199→                                    post = post,
   200→                                    onClick = { onPostClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   201→                                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   202→                                    onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   203→                                    onShareClick = {
   204→                                        val targetId = post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id
   205→                                        if (post.viewerHasShared) {
   206→                                            viewModel.unsharePost(targetId)
   207→                                        } else {
   208→                                            viewModel.sharePost(targetId)
   209→                                        }
   210→                                    },
   211→                                    onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   212→                                    onExternalShareClick = {
   213→                                        val displayPost = post.sharedPost ?: post
   214→                                        val shareUrl = displayPost.url ?: displayPost.iri
   215→                                        if (shareUrl != null) {
   216→                                            val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   217→                                                action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   218→                                                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   219→                                                type = "text/plain"
   220→                                            }
   221→                                            context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   222→                                        }
   223→                                    },
   224→                                    onQuotedPostClick = onPostClick
   225→                                )
   226→                                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   227→                            }
   228→
   229→                            if (uiState.isLoadingMore) {
   230→                                item {
   231→                                    LoadingItem()
   232→                                }
   233→                            }
   234→                        }
   235→                    }
   236→                }
   237→            }
   238→        }
   239→    }
   240→}
   241→
   242→@Composable
   243→private fun ProfileActionMenu(
   244→    followsViewer: Boolean,
   245→    viewerBlocks: Boolean,
   246→    isPerformingAction: Boolean,
   247→    onRemoveFollower: () -> Unit,
   248→    onBlock: () -> Unit,
   249→    onUnblock: () -> Unit
   250→) {
   251→    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   252→
   253→    Box {
   254→        IconButton(onClick = { expanded = true }) {
   255→            Icon(
   256→                imageVector = Icons.Filled.MoreVert,
   257→                contentDescription = "More actions"
   258→            )
   259→        }
   260→
   261→        DropdownMenu(
   262→            expanded = expanded,
   263→            onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
   264→        ) {
   265→            if (followsViewer) {
   266→                DropdownMenuItem(
   267→                    text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.remove_follower)) },
   268→                    onClick = {
   269→                        expanded = false
   270→                        onRemoveFollower()
   271→                    },
   272→                    enabled = !isPerformingAction
   273→                )
   274→            }
   275→
   276→            DropdownMenuItem(
   277→                text = {
   278→                    Text(
   279→                        text = stringResource(if (viewerBlocks) R.string.unblock else R.string.block),
   280→                        color = if (!viewerBlocks) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
   281→                    )
   282→                },
   283→                onClick = {
   284→                    expanded = false
   285→                    if (viewerBlocks) onUnblock() else onBlock()
   286→                },
   287→                enabled = !isPerformingAction
   288→            )
   289→        }
   290→    }
   291→}
   292→
   293→@Composable
   294→private fun ProfileHeader(
   295→    avatarUrl: String,
   296→    name: String?,
   297→    handle: String,
   298→    bio: String?,
   299→    isViewer: Boolean,
   300→    viewerFollows: Boolean,
   301→    followsViewer: Boolean,
   302→    viewerBlocks: Boolean,
   303→    isPerformingAction: Boolean,
   304→    onFollowClick: () -> Unit,
   305→    onUnfollowClick: () -> Unit,
   306→    onMentionClick: (String) -> Unit = {}
   307→) {
   308→    Column(
   309→        modifier = Modifier
   310→            .fillMaxWidth()
   311→            .padding(16.dp),
   312→        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally
   313→    ) {
   314→        AsyncImage(
   315→            model = avatarUrl,
   316→            contentDescription = null,
   317→            modifier = Modifier
   318→                .size(96.dp)
   319→                .clip(CircleShape),
   320→            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   321→        )
   322→
   323→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   324→
   325→        Text(
   326→            text = name ?: handle,
   327→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   328→            fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   329→            textAlign = TextAlign.Center
   330→        )
   331→
   332→        Row(
   333→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   334→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.Center
   335→        ) {
   336→            Text(
   337→                text = "@$handle",
   338→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   339→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   340→                textAlign = TextAlign.Center
   341→            )
   342→
   343→            if (!isViewer && (followsViewer || viewerBlocks)) {
   344→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   345→                RelationshipTags(
   346→                    followsViewer = followsViewer,
   347→                    viewerBlocks = viewerBlocks
   348→                )
   349→            }
   350→        }
   351→
   352→        if (!isViewer) {
   353→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   354→
   355→            if (viewerFollows) {
   356→                Button(
   357→                    onClick = onUnfollowClick,
   358→                    enabled = !isPerformingAction,
   359→                    colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   360→                        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   361→                    ),
   362→                    modifier = Modifier.width(200.dp)
   363→                ) {
   364→                    if (isPerformingAction) {
   365→                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   366→                            modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp),
   367→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onError,
   368→                            strokeWidth = 2.dp
   369→                        )
   370→                    } else {
   371→                        Text(stringResource(R.string.unfollow))
   372→                    }
   373→                }
   374→            } else {
   375→                Button(
   376→                    onClick = onFollowClick,
   377→                    enabled = !isPerformingAction,
   378→                    modifier = Modifier.width(200.dp)
   379→                ) {
   380→                    if (isPerformingAction) {
   381→                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   382→                            modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp),
   383→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   384→                            strokeWidth = 2.dp
   385→                        )
   386→                    } else {
   387→                        Text(stringResource(R.string.follow))
   388→                    }
   389→                }
   390→            }
   391→        }
   392→
   393→        if (!bio.isNullOrBlank()) {
   394→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   395→            HtmlContent(
   396→                html = bio,
   397→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   398→                onMentionClick = onMentionClick
   399→            )
   400→        }
   401→    }
   402→}
   403→
   404→@Composable
   405→private fun RelationshipTags(
   406→    followsViewer: Boolean,
   407→    viewerBlocks: Boolean
   408→) {
   409→    Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)) {
   410→        if (followsViewer) {
   411→            Text(
   412→                text = stringResource(R.string.follows_you),
   413→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   414→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   415→                modifier = Modifier
   416→                    .background(
   417→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.15f),
   418→                        RoundedCornerShape(50)
   419→                    )
   420→                    .padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp)
   421→            )
   422→        }
   423→
   424→        if (viewerBlocks) {
   425→            Text(
   426→                text = stringResource(R.string.blocked),
   427→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   428→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error,
   429→                modifier = Modifier
   430→                    .background(
   431→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error.copy(alpha = 0.15f),
   432→                        RoundedCornerShape(50)
   433→                    )
   434→                    .padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp)
   435→            )
   436→        }
   437→    }
   438→}
