   121→@Composable
   122→fun HackersPubApp(
   123→    deepLinkData: pub.hackers.android.DeepLinkData? = null,
   124→    viewModel: AppViewModel = hiltViewModel()
   125→) {
   126→    val navController = rememberNavController()
   127→    val isLoggedIn by viewModel.isLoggedIn.collectAsState(initial = false)
   128→
   129→    val fontSizePercent by viewModel.preferencesManager.fontSizePercent.collectAsState(initial = 100)
   130→
   131→    // Handle deep link for verification
   132→    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkData) {
   133→        deepLinkData?.let {
   134→            navController.navigate("signin?token=${it.token}&code=${it.code}")
   135→        }
   136→    }
   137→
   138→    ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler(preferencesManager = viewModel.preferencesManager) {
   139→    CompositionLocalProvider(LocalFontScale provides (fontSizePercent / 100f)) {
   140→
   141→    val bottomNavItems = if (isLoggedIn) {
   142→        listOf(Screen.Timeline, Screen.Notifications, Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   143→    } else {
   144→        listOf(Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   145→    }
   146→
   147→    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   148→    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
   149→    val showBottomBar = bottomNavItems.any { it.route == currentDestination?.route }
   150→
   151→    Scaffold(
   152→        bottomBar = {
   153→            if (showBottomBar) {
   154→                NavigationBar(
   155→                    modifier = Modifier
   156→                        .windowInsetsPadding(WindowInsets.navigationBars)
   157→                        .height(56.dp),
   158→                    windowInsets = WindowInsets(0)
   159→                ) {
   160→                    bottomNavItems.forEach { screen ->
   161→                        val selected = currentDestination?.hierarchy?.any { it.route == screen.route } == true
   162→                        NavigationBarItem(
   163→                            icon = {
   164→                                Icon(
   165→                                    if (selected) screen.selectedIcon else screen.unselectedIcon,
   166→                                    contentDescription = stringResource(screen.titleResId)
   167→                                )
   168→                            },
   169→                            label = null,
   170→                            selected = selected,
   171→                            onClick = {
   172→                                navController.navigate(screen.route) {
   173→                                    popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
   174→                                        saveState = true
   175→                                    }
   176→                                    launchSingleTop = true
   177→                                    restoreState = true
   178→                                }
   179→                            }
   180→                        )
   181→                    }
   182→                }
   183→            }
   184→        }
   185→    ) { innerPadding ->
   186→        NavHost(
   187→            navController = navController,
   188→            startDestination = if (isLoggedIn) Screen.Timeline.route else Screen.Explore.route,
   189→            modifier = Modifier.padding(innerPadding)
   190→        ) {
   191→            composable(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   192→                TimelineScreen(
   193→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   194→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   195→                    },
   196→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   197→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   198→                    },
   199→                    onComposeClick = { replyTo ->
   200→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo))
   201→                    },
   202→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   203→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   204→                    }
   205→                )
   206→            }
   207→
   208→            composable(Screen.Notifications.route) {
   209→                NotificationsScreen(
   210→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   211→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   212→                    },
   213→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   214→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   215→                    },
   216→                    onComposeClick = {
   217→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute())
   218→                    }
   219→                )
   220→            }
   221→
   222→            composable(Screen.Explore.route) {
   223→                ExploreScreen(
   224→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   225→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   226→                    },
   227→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   228→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   229→                    },
   230→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   231→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(postId))
   232→                    },
   233→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   234→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   235→                    },
   236→                    onComposeClick = {
   237→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute())
   238→                    },
   239→                    onSignInClick = {
   240→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   241→                    },
   242→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   243→                )
   244→            }
   245→
   246→            composable(Screen.Search.route) {
   247→                SearchScreen(
   248→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   249→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   250→                    },
   251→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   252→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   253→                    },
   254→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   255→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   256→                    },
   257→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   258→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   259→                    }
   260→                )
   261→            }
   262→
   263→            composable(Screen.Settings.route) {
   264→                SettingsScreen(
   265→                    onSignInClick = {
   266→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   267→                    },
   268→                    onSignOutComplete = {
   269→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Explore.route) {
   270→                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   271→                        }
   272→                    },
   273→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   274→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   275→                    },
   276→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   277→                )
   278→            }
   279→
   280→            composable(
   281→                route = DetailScreen.SignIn.route,
   282→                arguments = listOf(
   283→                    navArgument("token") {
   284→                        type = NavType.StringType
   285→                        nullable = true
   286→                        defaultValue = null
   287→                    },
   288→                    navArgument("code") {
   289→                        type = NavType.StringType
   290→                        nullable = true
   291→                        defaultValue = null
   292→                    }
   293→                )
   294→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   295→                val token = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("token")
   296→                val code = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("code")
   297→                SignInScreen(
   298→                    deepLinkToken = token,
   299→                    deepLinkCode = code,
   300→                    onSignInSuccess = {
   301→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   302→                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   303→                        }
   304→                    },
   305→                    onNavigateBack = {
   306→                        navController.popBackStack()
   307→                    }
   308→                )
   309→            }
   310→
   311→            composable(
   312→                route = DetailScreen.Compose.route,
   313→                arguments = listOf(
   314→                    navArgument("replyTo") {
   315→                        type = NavType.StringType
   316→                        nullable = true
   317→                        defaultValue = null
   318→                    },
   319→                    navArgument("quoteOf") {
   320→                        type = NavType.StringType
   321→                        nullable = true
   322→                        defaultValue = null
   323→                    }
   324→                )
   325→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   326→                val replyTo = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("replyTo")
   327→                val quoteOf = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("quoteOf")
   328→                ComposeScreen(
   329→                    replyToId = replyTo,
   330→                    quotedPostId = quoteOf,
   331→                    onPostSuccess = {
   332→                        navController.popBackStack()
   333→                    },
   334→                    onNavigateBack = {
   335→                        navController.popBackStack()
   336→                    }
   337→                )
   338→            }
   339→
   340→            composable(
   341→                route = DetailScreen.PostDetail.route,
   342→                arguments = listOf(navArgument("postId") { type = NavType.StringType })
   343→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   344→                val postId = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("postId") ?: return@composable
   345→                PostDetailScreen(
   346→                    postId = postId,
   347→                    onNavigateBack = {
   348→                        navController.popBackStack()
   349→                    },
   350→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   351→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   352→                    },
   353→                    onReplyClick = { id ->
   354→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = id))
   355→                    },
   356→                    onQuoteClick = { id ->
   357→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = id))
   358→                    },
   359→                    onPostClick = { id ->
   360→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(id))
   361→                    },
   362→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   363→                )
   364→            }
   365→
   366→            composable(
   367→                route = DetailScreen.Profile.route,
   368→                arguments = listOf(navArgument("handle") { type = NavType.StringType })
   369→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   370→                val handle = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("handle") ?: return@composable
   371→                ProfileScreen(
   372→                    handle = handle,
   373→                    onNavigateBack = {
   374→                        navController.popBackStack()
   375→                    },
   376→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   377→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   378→                    },
   379→                    onProfileClick = { profileHandle ->
   380→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(profileHandle))
   381→                    },
   382→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   383→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   384→                    },
   385→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   386→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   387→                    }
   388→                )
   389→            }
   390→        }
   391→    }
   392→    } // CompositionLocalProvider
   393→    } // ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler
   394→}

    64→@Composable
    65→fun PostCard(
    66→    post: Post,
    67→    onClick: () -> Unit,
    68→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    69→    onReplyClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    70→    onShareClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    71→    onQuoteClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    72→    onReactionClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    73→    onExternalShareClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
    74→    onQuotedPostClick: ((String) -> Unit)? = null,
    75→    contentMaxLength: Int = 0,
    76→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
    77→) {
    78→    val displayPost = post.sharedPost ?: post
    79→    val isRepost = post.sharedPost != null
    80→
    81→    Card(
    82→        modifier = modifier
    83→            .fillMaxWidth()
    84→            .clickable(onClick = onClick),
    85→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
    86→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
    87→        ),
    88→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 0.dp)
    89→    ) {
    90→        Column(
    91→            modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
    92→        ) {
    93→            if (isRepost) {
    94→                Row(
    95→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
    96→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 8.dp)
    97→                ) {
    98→                    Icon(
    99→                        imageVector = Icons.Filled.Repeat,
   100→                        contentDescription = null,
   101→                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary,
   102→                        modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   103→                    )
   104→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   105→                    Text(
   106→                        text = "${post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle} ${stringResource(R.string.share)}d",
   107→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   108→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
   109→                    )
   110→                }
   111→            }
   112→
   113→            Row(
   114→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   115→            ) {
   116→                AsyncImage(
   117→                    model = displayPost.actor.avatarUrl,
   118→                    contentDescription = "Avatar",
   119→                    modifier = Modifier
   120→                        .size(48.dp)
   121→                        .clip(CircleShape)
   122→                        .clickable { onProfileClick(displayPost.actor.handle) },
   123→                    contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   124→                )
   125→
   126→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   127→
   128→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   129→                    Row(
   130→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   131→                    ) {
   132→                        Text(
   133→                            text = displayPost.actor.name ?: displayPost.actor.handle,
   134→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   135→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   136→                            maxLines = 1,
   137→                            overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
   138→                            modifier = Modifier
   139→                                .weight(1f, fill = false)
   140→                                .clickable { onProfileClick(displayPost.actor.handle) }
   141→                        )
   142→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   143→                        Text(
   144→                            text = formatRelativeTime(displayPost.published),
   145→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   146→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   147→                        )
   148→                    }
   149→
   150→                    Text(
   151→                        text = "@${displayPost.actor.handle}",
   152→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   153→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   154→                        maxLines = 1,
   155→                        overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   156→                    )
   157→                }
   158→            }
   159→
   160→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   161→
   162→            if (displayPost.typename == "Article") {
   163→                Text(
   164→                    text = "Article",
   165→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   166→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   167→                    modifier = Modifier
   168→                        .background(
   169→                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.1f),
   170→                            RoundedCornerShape(4.dp)
   171→                        )
   172→                        .padding(horizontal = 6.dp, vertical = 2.dp)
   173→                )
   174→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   175→            }
   176→
   177→            displayPost.name?.let { title ->
   178→                Text(
   179→                    text = title,
   180→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   181→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   182→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 4.dp)
   183→                )
   184→            }
   185→
   186→            val truncatedContent = if (contentMaxLength > 0 && displayPost.content.length > contentMaxLength) {
   187→                displayPost.content.take(contentMaxLength)
   188→            } else {
   189→                displayPost.content
   190→            }
   191→            val isTruncated = contentMaxLength > 0 && displayPost.content.length > contentMaxLength
   192→
   193→            HtmlContent(
   194→                html = truncatedContent,
   195→                maxLines = if (contentMaxLength > 0) Int.MAX_VALUE else 10,
   196→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   197→                onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   198→            )
   199→
   200→            if (isTruncated || (contentMaxLength == 0 && displayPost.content.length > 500)) {
   201→                Text(
   202→                    text = stringResource(R.string.read_more),
   203→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   204→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   205→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 4.dp)
   206→                )
   207→            }
   208→
   209→            if (displayPost.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   210→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   211→                MediaGrid(media = displayPost.media)
   212→            }
   213→
   214→            if (displayPost.quotedPost != null) {
   215→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   216→                QuotedPostPreview(
   217→                    post = displayPost.quotedPost!!,
   218→                    onClick = { onQuotedPostClick?.invoke(displayPost.quotedPost!!.id) },
   219→                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   220→                )
   221→            }
   222→
   223→            if (displayPost.reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   224→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   225→                FlowRow(
   226→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(6.dp),
   227→                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   228→                ) {
   229→                    displayPost.reactionGroups.forEach { group ->
   230→                        Surface(
   231→                            shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
   232→                            color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   233→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.15f)
   234→                            else
   235→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   236→                        ) {
   237→                            Row(
   238→                                modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
   239→                                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   240→                            ) {
   241→                                if (group.emoji != null) {
   242→                                    Text(
   243→                                        text = group.emoji,
   244→                                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall
   245→                                    )
   246→                                } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
   247→                                    AsyncImage(
   248→                                        model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
   249→                                        contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
   250→                                        modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp)
   251→                                    )
   252→                                }
   253→                                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   254→                                Text(
   255→                                    text = group.count.toString(),
   256→                                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   257→                                    color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   258→                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   259→                                    else
   260→                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   261→                                )
   262→                            }
   263→                        }
   264→                    }
   265→                }
   266→            }
   267→
   268→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   269→
   270→            EngagementBar(
   271→                post = displayPost,
   272→                onReplyClick = onReplyClick,
   273→                onShareClick = onShareClick,
   274→                onQuoteClick = onQuoteClick,
   275→                onReactionClick = onReactionClick,
   276→                onExternalShareClick = onExternalShareClick
   277→            )
   278→        }
   279→    }
   280→}

   282→@Composable
   283→private fun EngagementBar(
   284→    post: Post,
   285→    onReplyClick: (() -> Unit)?,
   286→    onShareClick: (() -> Unit)?,
   287→    onQuoteClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
   288→    onReactionClick: (() -> Unit)? = null,
   289→    onExternalShareClick: (() -> Unit)? = null
   290→) {
   291→    Row(
   292→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   293→        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
   294→    ) {
   295→        EngagementButton(
   296→            icon = Icons.Outlined.ChatBubbleOutline,
   297→            count = post.engagementStats.replies,
   298→            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.replies),
   299→            onClick = onReplyClick
   300→        )
   301→
   302→        EngagementButton(
   303→            icon = if (post.viewerHasShared) Icons.Filled.Repeat else Icons.Outlined.Repeat,
   304→            count = post.engagementStats.shares,
   305→            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.shares),
   306→            onClick = onShareClick,
   307→            isActive = post.viewerHasShared
   308→        )
   309→
   310→        EngagementButton(
   311→            icon = if (post.reactionGroups.any { it.viewerHasReacted }) Icons.Filled.Favorite else Icons.Outlined.Favorite,
   312→            count = post.engagementStats.reactions,
   313→            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reactions),
   314→            onClick = onReactionClick,
   315→            isActive = post.reactionGroups.any { it.viewerHasReacted }
   316→        )
   317→
   318→        EngagementButton(
   319→            icon = Icons.Outlined.FormatQuote,
   320→            count = post.engagementStats.quotes,
   321→            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
   322→            onClick = onQuoteClick
   323→        )
   324→
   325→        if (onExternalShareClick != null) {
   326→            IconButton(
   327→                onClick = onExternalShareClick,
   328→                modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp)
   329→            ) {
   330→                Icon(
   331→                    imageVector = Icons.Outlined.Share,
   332→                    contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
   333→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   334→                    modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp)
   335→                )
   336→            }
   337→        }
   338→    }
   339→}

   341→@Composable
   342→private fun EngagementButton(
   343→    icon: androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector,
   344→    count: Int,
   345→    contentDescription: String,
   346→    onClick: (() -> Unit)?,
   347→    isActive: Boolean = false
   348→) {
   349→    Row(
   350→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   351→    ) {
   352→        IconButton(
   353→            onClick = { onClick?.invoke() },
   354→            enabled = onClick != null
   355→        ) {
   356→            Icon(
   357→                imageVector = icon,
   358→                contentDescription = contentDescription,
   359→                tint = if (isActive) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   360→                modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   361→            )
   362→        }
   363→        if (count > 0) {
   364→            Text(
   365→                text = formatCount(count),
   366→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   367→                color = if (isActive) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   368→            )
   369→        }
   370→    }
   371→}

   378→) {
   379→    Surface(

   401→                        .clip(CircleShape)

   407→
   408→                Text(

   415→                        .weight(1f, fill = false)
   416→                        .clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) }
   417→                )
   418→
   419→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   420→
   421→                Text(
   422→                    text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   423→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   424→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   425→                    maxLines = 1,
   426→                    overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
   427→                    modifier = Modifier.weight(1f, fill = false)
   428→                )
   429→            }
   430→
   431→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   432→
   433→            post.name?.let { title ->
   434→                Text(
   435→                    text = title,
   436→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   437→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   438→                    maxLines = 1,
   439→                    overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
   440→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 4.dp)
   441→                )
   442→            }
   443→
   444→            HtmlContent(
   445→                html = post.content,
   446→                maxLines = 3,
   447→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   448→                onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   449→            )
   450→
   451→            if (post.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   452→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   453→                AsyncImage(
   454→                    model = post.media.first().url,
   455→                    contentDescription = post.media.first().alt,
   456→                    modifier = Modifier
   457→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   458→                        .height(120.dp)
   459→                        .clip(RoundedCornerShape(8.dp)),
   460→                    contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   461→                )
   462→            }
   463→        }
   464→    }
   465→}
   466→
   467→@Composable
   468→fun MediaGrid(media: List<pub.hackers.android.domain.model.Media>) {
   469→    when (media.size) {
   470→        1 -> {
   471→            MediaImage(
   472→                url = media[0].url,
   473→                alt = media[0].alt,
   474→                modifier = Modifier
   475→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   476→                    .height(200.dp)
   477→                    .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   478→            )
   479→        }
   480→        2 -> {
   481→            Row(
   482→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   483→            ) {
   484→                media.forEach { item ->
   485→                    MediaImage(
   486→                        url = item.url,
   487→                        alt = item.alt,
   488→                        modifier = Modifier
   489→                            .weight(1f)
   490→                            .height(150.dp)
   491→                            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   492→                    )
   493→                }
   494→            }
   495→        }
   496→        else -> {
   497→            Column(
   498→                verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   499→            ) {
   500→                Row(
   501→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   502→                ) {
   503→                    media.take(2).forEach { item ->
   504→                        MediaImage(
   505→                            url = item.url,
   506→                            alt = item.alt,
   507→                            modifier = Modifier
   508→                                .weight(1f)
   509→                                .height(100.dp)
   510→                                .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   511→                        )
   512→                    }
   513→                }
   514→                if (media.size > 2) {
   515→                    Row(
   516→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   517→                    ) {
   518→                        media.drop(2).take(2).forEach { item ->
   519→                            MediaImage(
   520→                                url = item.url,
   521→                                alt = item.alt,
   522→                                modifier = Modifier
   523→                                    .weight(1f)
   524→                                    .height(100.dp)
   525→                                    .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   526→                            )
   527→                        }
   528→                    }
   529→                }
   530→            }
   531→        }
   532→    }
   533→}
   534→
   535→@Composable
   536→private fun MediaImage(
   537→    url: String,
   538→    alt: String?,
   539→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
   540→) {
   541→    val context = LocalContext.current
   542→    var showMenu by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   543→
   544→    Box {
   545→        AsyncImage(
   546→            model = url,
   547→            contentDescription = alt,
   548→            modifier = modifier.combinedClickable(
   549→                onClick = {
   550→                    // Open image in browser/viewer
   551→                    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse(url))
   552→                    context.startActivity(intent)
   553→                },
   554→                onLongClick = { showMenu = true }
   555→            ),
   556→            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   557→        )
   558→
   559→        DropdownMenu(
   560→            expanded = showMenu,
   561→            onDismissRequest = { showMenu = false }
   562→        ) {
   563→            DropdownMenuItem(
   564→                text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.share)) },
   565→                onClick = {
   566→                    showMenu = false
   567→                    val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   568→                        action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   569→                        putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, url)
   570→                        type = "text/plain"
   571→                    }
   572→                    context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   573→                }
   574→            )
   575→            DropdownMenuItem(
   576→                text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.open_in_browser)) },
   577→                onClick = {
   578→                    showMenu = false
   579→                    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse(url))
   580→                    context.startActivity(intent)
   581→                }
   582→            )
   583→        }
   584→    }
   585→}
   586→
   587→private fun formatRelativeTime(instant: Instant): String {
   588→    val now = Instant.now()
   589→    val duration = Duration.between(instant, now)
   590→
   591→    return when {
   592→        duration.toMinutes() < 1 -> "now"
   593→        duration.toMinutes() < 60 -> "${duration.toMinutes()}m"
   594→        duration.toHours() < 24 -> "${duration.toHours()}h"
   595→        duration.toDays() < 7 -> "${duration.toDays()}d"
   596→        duration.toDays() < 30 -> "${duration.toDays() / 7}w"
   597→        duration.toDays() < 365 -> "${duration.toDays() / 30}mo"
   598→        else -> "${duration.toDays() / 365}y"
   599→    }
   600→}
   601→
   602→private fun formatCount(count: Int): String {
   603→    return when {
   604→        count < 1000 -> count.toString()
   605→        count < 1_000_000 -> String.format("%.1fK", count / 1000.0)
   606→        else -> String.format("%.1fM", count / 1_000_000.0)
   607→    }
   608→}

1→package pub.hackers.android
     2→
     3→import android.content.Intent
     4→import android.os.Bundle
     5→import androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
     6→import androidx.activity.compose.setContent
     7→import androidx.activity.enableEdgeToEdge
     8→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
     9→import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme
    10→import androidx.compose.material3.Surface
    11→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
    12→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
    13→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    15→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
    16→import pub.hackers.android.ui.HackersPubApp
    17→import pub.hackers.android.ui.theme.HackersPubTheme
    18→
    19→data class DeepLinkData(
    20→    val token: String,
    21→    val code: String
    22→)
    23→
    24→@AndroidEntryPoint
    25→class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
    26→
    27→    private var deepLinkData by mutableStateOf<DeepLinkData?>(null)
    28→
    29→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
    30→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
    31→        handleDeepLink(intent)
    32→        enableEdgeToEdge()
    33→        setContent {
    34→            HackersPubTheme {
    35→                Surface(
    36→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
    37→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background
    38→                ) {
    39→                    HackersPubApp(deepLinkData = deepLinkData)
    40→                }
    41→            }
    42→        }
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    override fun onNewIntent(intent: Intent) {
    46→        super.onNewIntent(intent)
    47→        handleDeepLink(intent)
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    private fun handleDeepLink(intent: Intent?) {
    51→        val data = intent?.data ?: return
    52→        if (data.scheme == "hackerspub" && data.host == "verify") {
    53→            val token = data.getQueryParameter("token")
    54→            val code = data.getQueryParameter("code")
    55→            if (token != null && code != null) {
    56→                deepLinkData = DeepLinkData(token = token, code = code)
    57→            }
    58→        }
    59→    }
    60→}
    61→

    67→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    68→@Composable
    69→fun NotificationsScreen(
    70→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    71→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    72→    onComposeClick: () -> Unit = {},
    73→    viewModel: NotificationsViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    74→) {
    75→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    76→    val listState = rememberLazyListState()
    77→    val lifecycleOwner = LocalLifecycleOwner.current
    78→
    79→    DisposableEffect(lifecycleOwner) {
    80→        val observer = LifecycleEventObserver { _, event ->
    81→            if (event == Lifecycle.Event.ON_RESUME) {
    82→                viewModel.refreshIfStale()
    83→            }
    84→        }
    85→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.addObserver(observer)
    86→        onDispose { lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.removeObserver(observer) }
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    val shouldLoadMore by remember {
    90→        derivedStateOf {
    91→            val lastVisibleItem = listState.layoutInfo.visibleItemsInfo.lastOrNull()
    92→            lastVisibleItem != null && lastVisibleItem.index >= listState.layoutInfo.totalItemsCount - 3
    93→        }
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    LaunchedEffect(shouldLoadMore) {
    97→        if (shouldLoadMore && uiState.hasNextPage && !uiState.isLoadingMore) {
    98→            viewModel.loadMore()
    99→        }
   100→    }
   101→
   102→    Scaffold(
   103→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   104→        topBar = {
   105→            CompactTopBar(title = stringResource(R.string.nav_notifications))
   106→        },
   107→        floatingActionButton = {
   108→            FloatingActionButton(onClick = onComposeClick) {
   109→                Icon(
   110→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.Add,
   111→                    contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.compose)
   112→                )
   113→            }
   114→        }
   115→    ) { paddingValues ->
   116→        Box(
   117→            modifier = Modifier
   118→                .fillMaxSize()
   119→                .padding(paddingValues)
   120→        ) {
   121→            when {
   122→                uiState.isLoading && uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   123→                    FullScreenLoading()
   124→                }
   125→                uiState.error != null && uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   126→                    ErrorMessage(
   127→                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   128→                        onRetry = { viewModel.refresh() }
   129→                    )
   130→                }
   131→                uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   132→                    ErrorMessage(
   133→                        message = stringResource(R.string.no_notifications),
   134→                        icon = Icons.Outlined.NotificationsOff
   135→                    )
   136→                }
   137→                else -> {
   138→                    PullToRefreshBox(
   139→                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   140→                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   141→                    ) {
   142→                        LazyColumn(state = listState) {
   143→                            items(
   144→                                items = uiState.notifications,
   145→                                key = { it.id }
   146→                            ) { notification ->
   147→                                NotificationItem(
   148→                                    notification = notification,
   149→                                    onPostClick = onPostClick,
   150→                                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   151→                                )
   152→                                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   153→                            }
   154→
   155→                            if (uiState.isLoadingMore) {
   156→                                item {
   157→                                    LoadingItem()
   158→                                }
   159→                            }
   160→                        }
   161→                    }
   162→                }
   163→            }
   164→        }
   165→    }
   166→}
   167→
   168→@Composable
   169→private fun NotificationItem(
   170→    notification: Notification,
   171→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   172→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit
   173→) {
   174→    val (icon, iconColor, actionText) = when (notification) {
   175→        is Notification.Follow -> Triple(
   176→            Icons.Default.PersonAdd,
   177→            Color(0xFF4CAF50),
   178→            stringResource(R.string.notification_follow)
   179→        )
   180→        is Notification.Mention -> Triple(
   181→            Icons.Outlined.AlternateEmail,
   182→            Color(0xFF2196F3),
   183→            stringResource(R.string.notification_mention)
   184→        )
   185→        is Notification.Reply -> Triple(
   186→            Icons.Default.Reply,
   187→            Color(0xFF9C27B0),
   188→            stringResource(R.string.notification_reply)
   189→        )
   190→        is Notification.Quote -> Triple(
   191→            Icons.Default.FormatQuote,
   192→            Color(0xFFFF9800),
   193→            stringResource(R.string.notification_quote)
   194→        )
   195→        is Notification.Share -> Triple(
   196→            Icons.Default.Repeat,
   197→            Color(0xFF00BCD4),
   198→            stringResource(R.string.notification_share)
   199→        )
   200→        is Notification.React -> Triple(
   201→            Icons.Default.Favorite,
   202→            Color(0xFFE91E63),
   203→            notification.emoji?.let { "$it" } ?: stringResource(R.string.notification_react)
   204→        )
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    val post = when (notification) {
   208→        is Notification.Mention -> notification.post
   209→        is Notification.Reply -> notification.post
   210→        is Notification.Quote -> notification.post
   211→        is Notification.Share -> notification.post
   212→        is Notification.React -> notification.post
   213→        else -> null
   214→    }
   215→
   216→    val actor = notification.actors.firstOrNull()
   217→
   218→    val customEmoji = (notification as? Notification.React)?.customEmoji
   219→    val emojiChar = (notification as? Notification.React)?.emoji
   220→
   221→    Row(
   222→        modifier = Modifier
   223→            .fillMaxWidth()
   224→            .clickable {
   225→                when {
   226→                    post != null -> onPostClick(post.id)
   227→                    actor != null -> onProfileClick(actor.handle)
   228→                }
   229→            }
   230→            .padding(12.dp),
   231→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.Top
   232→    ) {
   233→        if (customEmoji != null) {
   234→            AsyncImage(
   235→                model = customEmoji.imageUrl,
   236→                contentDescription = customEmoji.name,
   237→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp)
   238→            )
   239→        } else if (emojiChar != null) {
   240→            Text(
   241→                text = emojiChar,
   242→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp),
   243→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium
   244→            )
   245→        } else {
   246→            Icon(
   247→                imageVector = icon,
   248→                contentDescription = null,
   249→                tint = iconColor,
   250→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp)
   251→            )
   252→        }
   253→
   254→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   255→
   256→        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   257→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   258→                if (actor != null) {
   259→                    AsyncImage(
   260→                        model = actor.avatarUrl,
   261→                        contentDescription = null,
   262→                        modifier = Modifier
   263→                            .size(32.dp)
   264→                            .clip(CircleShape)
   265→                            .clickable { onProfileClick(actor.handle) },
   266→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   267→                    )
   268→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   269→                }
   270→
   271→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   272→                    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   273→                        val actorDisplayName = actor?.name ?: actor?.handle ?: "Someone"
   274→                        val allActors = notification.actors
   275→                        val actorLabel = when {
   276→                            allActors.size == 2 -> "$actorDisplayName and ${allActors[1].name ?: allActors[1].handle}"
   277→                            allActors.size > 2 -> "$actorDisplayName and ${allActors.size - 1} others"
   278→                            else -> actorDisplayName
   279→                        }
   280→                        Text(
   281→                            text = actorLabel,
   282→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   283→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   284→                            maxLines = 1,
   285→                            overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
   286→                            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f, fill = false)
   287→                        )
   288→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   289→                        Text(
   290→                            text = actionText,
   291→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   292→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   293→                        )
   294→                    }
   295→                    Text(
   296→                        text = formatRelativeTime(notification.created),
   297→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   298→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   299→                    )
   300→                }
   301→            }
   302→
   303→            val shouldHavePost = notification is Notification.Mention ||
   304→                notification is Notification.Reply ||
   305→                notification is Notification.Quote ||
   306→                notification is Notification.Share ||
   307→                notification is Notification.React
   308→
   309→            if (post != null) {
   310→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp))
   311→                HtmlContent(
   312→                    html = post.content,
   313→                    maxLines = 3,
   314→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   315→                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   316→                )
   317→            } else if (shouldHavePost) {
   318→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp))
   319→                Text(
   320→                    text = stringResource(R.string.notification_post_unavailable),
   321→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   322→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.6f),
   323→                    fontStyle = androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontStyle.Italic
   324→                )
   325→            }
   326→        }
   327→    }
   328→}
   329→
   330→private fun formatRelativeTime(instant: Instant): String {
   331→    val now = Instant.now()
   332→    val duration = Duration.between(instant, now)
   333→
   334→    return when {
   335→        duration.toMinutes() < 1 -> "now"
   336→        duration.toMinutes() < 60 -> "${duration.toMinutes()}m"
   337→        duration.toHours() < 24 -> "${duration.toHours()}h"
   338→        duration.toDays() < 7 -> "${duration.toDays()}d"
   339→        else -> "${duration.toDays() / 7}w"
   340→    }
   341→}

    80→@Composable
    81→fun ComposeScreen(
    82→    replyToId: String?,
    83→    quotedPostId: String? = null,
    84→    onPostSuccess: () -> Unit,
    85→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    86→    viewModel: ComposeViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    87→) {
    88→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    89→    val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
    90→    var showVisibilityMenu by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    91→    var showPreview by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    92→
    93→    // Track TextFieldValue for cursor position
    94→    var textFieldValue by remember {
    95→        mutableStateOf(TextFieldValue(text = uiState.content))
    96→    }
    97→
    98→    // Track cursor and text field positions for popup placement
    99→    var cursorRect by remember { mutableStateOf(Rect.Zero) }
   100→    var textFieldBounds by remember { mutableStateOf(Rect.Zero) }
   101→    var textLayoutResult by remember { mutableStateOf<TextLayoutResult?>(null) }
   102→    val scrollState = rememberScrollState()
   103→    val density = LocalDensity.current
   104→    val popupHeight = with(density) { 200.dp.toPx() } // Estimated popup height
   105→
   106→    // Sync TextFieldValue with ViewModel state changes (e.g., when mention is selected)
   107→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.content, uiState.cursorPosition) {
   108→        if (textFieldValue.text != uiState.content) {
   109→            textFieldValue = TextFieldValue(
   110→                text = uiState.content,
   111→                selection = TextRange(uiState.cursorPosition)
   112→            )
   113→        }
   114→    }
   115→
   116→    LaunchedEffect(replyToId) {
   117→        replyToId?.let { viewModel.setReplyTarget(it) }
   118→    }
   119→
   120→    LaunchedEffect(quotedPostId) {
   121→        quotedPostId?.let { viewModel.setQuotedPost(it) }
   122→    }
   123→
   124→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isPosted) {
   125→        if (uiState.isPosted) {
   126→            onPostSuccess()
   127→        }
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.error) {
   131→        uiState.error?.let {
   132→            snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(it)
   133→            viewModel.clearError()
   134→        }
   135→    }
   136→
   137→    Scaffold(
   138→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   139→        topBar = {
   140→            CompactTopBar(
   141→                title = when {
   142→                    replyToId != null -> stringResource(R.string.reply)
   143→                    quotedPostId != null -> stringResource(R.string.quoting)
   144→                    else -> stringResource(R.string.compose)
   145→                },
   146→                navigationIcon = {
   147→                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   148→                        Icon(
   149→                            imageVector = Icons.Default.Close,
   150→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.cancel)
   151→                        )
   152→                    }
   153→                },
   154→                actions = {
   155→                    Button(
   156→                        onClick = { viewModel.post() },
   157→                        enabled = uiState.content.isNotBlank() && !uiState.isPosting
   158→                    ) {
   159→                        Text(stringResource(R.string.post))
   160→                    }
   161→                }
   162→            )
   163→        },
   164→        snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) }
   165→    ) { paddingValues ->
   166→        Column(
   167→            modifier = Modifier
   168→                .fillMaxSize()
   169→                .padding(paddingValues)
   170→                .padding(16.dp)
   171→        ) {
   172→            // Reply target preview
   173→            if (uiState.isLoadingReplyTarget) {
   174→                CircularProgressIndicator(
   175→                    modifier = Modifier
   176→                        .size(24.dp)
   177→                        .align(Alignment.CenterHorizontally)
   178→                )
   179→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   180→            } else if (uiState.replyTargetPost != null) {
   181→                Text(
   182→                    text = "${stringResource(R.string.replying_to)} @${uiState.replyTargetPost!!.actor.handle}",
   183→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   184→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   185→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 4.dp)
   186→                )
   187→                ReplyTargetPreview(
   188→                    post = uiState.replyTargetPost!!,
   189→                    modifier = Modifier.alpha(0.6f)
   190→                )
   191→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   192→            }
   193→
   194→            // Quoted post preview
   195→            if (uiState.isLoadingQuotedPost) {
   196→                QuoteIndicator(isLoading = true)
   197→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   198→            } else if (uiState.quotedPost != null) {
   199→                QuoteIndicator(isLoading = false, post = uiState.quotedPost)
   200→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   201→            } else if (uiState.quotedPostLoadFailed) {
   202→                QuoteIndicator(isLoading = false, failed = true)
   203→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   204→            }
   205→
   206→            // Edit/Preview toggle
   207→            TabRow(
   208→                selectedTabIndex = if (showPreview) 1 else 0
   209→            ) {
   210→                Tab(
   211→                    selected = !showPreview,
   212→                    onClick = { showPreview = false },
   213→                    text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.compose_edit)) }
   214→                )
   215→                Tab(
   216→                    selected = showPreview,
   217→                    onClick = { showPreview = true },
   218→                    text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.compose_preview)) }
   219→                )
   220→            }
   221→
   222→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   223→
   224→            Box(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   225→                if (showPreview) {
   226→                    // Preview mode
   227→                    if (textFieldValue.text.isBlank()) {
   228→                        Box(
   229→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
   230→                            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   231→                        ) {
   232→                            Text(
   233→                                text = stringResource(R.string.compose_preview_empty),
   234→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   235→                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   236→                            )
   237→                        }
   238→                    } else {
   239→                        val previewHtml = remember(textFieldValue.text) {
   240→                            markdownToHtml(textFieldValue.text)
   241→                        }
   242→                        Surface(
   243→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
   244→                            shape = RoundedCornerShape(4.dp),
   245→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface,
   246→                            border = BorderStroke(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline)
   247→                        ) {
   248→                            Box(
   249→                                modifier = Modifier
   250→                                    .fillMaxSize()
   251→                                    .padding(16.dp)
   252→                                    .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
   253→                            ) {
   254→                                HtmlContent(
   255→                                    html = previewHtml,
   256→                                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   257→                                )
   258→                            }
   259→                        }
   260→                    }
   261→                } else {
   262→                // Edit mode - Custom text field with cursor position tracking
   263→                Surface(
   264→                    modifier = Modifier
   265→                        .fillMaxSize()
   266→                        .onGloballyPositioned { coordinates ->
   267→                            textFieldBounds = coordinates.boundsInWindow()
   268→                        },
   269→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(4.dp),
   270→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface,
   271→                    border = BorderStroke(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline)
   272→                ) {
   273→                    Box(
   274→                        modifier = Modifier
   275→                            .fillMaxSize()
   276→                            .padding(16.dp)
   277→                            .verticalScroll(scrollState)
   278→                    ) {
   279→                        BasicTextField(
   280→                            value = textFieldValue,
   281→                            onValueChange = { newValue: TextFieldValue ->
   282→                                textFieldValue = newValue
   283→                                viewModel.updateContent(
   284→                                    content = newValue.text,
   285→                                    cursorPosition = newValue.selection.start
   286→                                )
   287→                            },
   288→                            onTextLayout = { result: TextLayoutResult ->
   289→                                textLayoutResult = result
   290→                                // Update cursor position
   291→                                val cursorPos = textFieldValue.selection.start
   292→                                    .coerceIn(0, textFieldValue.text.length)
   293→                                cursorRect = if (textFieldValue.text.isNotEmpty() || cursorPos == 0) {
   294→                                    result.getCursorRect(cursorPos)
   295→                                } else {
   296→                                    Rect.Zero
   297→                                }
   298→                            },
   299→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   300→                            enabled = !uiState.isPosting,
   301→                            textStyle = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge.copy(
   302→                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
   303→                            ),
   304→                            cursorBrush = SolidColor(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary),
   305→                            decorationBox = { innerTextField ->
   306→                                Box {
   307→                                    if (textFieldValue.text.isEmpty()) {
   308→                                        Text(
   309→                                            text = stringResource(R.string.compose_hint),
   310→                                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   311→                                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   312→                                        )
   313→                                    }
   314→                                    innerTextField()
   315→                                }
   316→                            }
   317→                        )
   318→                    }
   319→                }
   320→
   321→                // Mention autocomplete popup
   322→                if (uiState.mentionSuggestions.isNotEmpty() || uiState.isLoadingMentions) {
   323→                    // Calculate cursor position accounting for padding and scroll
   324→                    val paddingPx = with(density) { 16.dp.toPx() }
   325→                    val cursorYInBox = cursorRect.bottom - scrollState.value + paddingPx
   326→                    val cursorXInBox = cursorRect.left + paddingPx
   327→
   328→                    // Clamp to visible area
   329→                    val visibleCursorY = cursorYInBox.coerceIn(paddingPx, textFieldBounds.height - paddingPx)
   330→
   331→                    Popup(
   332→                        alignment = Alignment.TopStart,
   333→                        offset = IntOffset(
   334→                            x = cursorXInBox.roundToInt().coerceIn(0, (textFieldBounds.width - with(density) { 280.dp.toPx() }).toInt().coerceAtLeast(0)),
   335→                            y = (visibleCursorY + with(density) { 20.dp.toPx() }).roundToInt()
   336→                        ),
   337→                        properties = PopupProperties(focusable = false)
   338→                    ) {
   339→                        MentionAutocomplete(
   340→                            suggestions = uiState.mentionSuggestions,
   341→                            isLoading = uiState.isLoadingMentions,
   342→                            onSuggestionSelected = { actor ->
   343→                                val (newContent, newCursor) = viewModel.selectMention(actor)
   344→                                textFieldValue = TextFieldValue(
   345→                                    text = newContent,
   346→                                    selection = TextRange(newCursor)
   347→                                )
   348→                            },
   349→                            modifier = Modifier.width(280.dp)
   350→                        )
   351→                    }
   352→                }
   353→                } // end else (edit mode)
   354→            }
   355→
   356→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   357→
   358→            Row(
   359→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   360→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   361→            ) {
   362→                Text(
   363→                    text = uiState.language.uppercase(),
   364→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   365→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   366→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 8.dp)
   367→                )
   368→                TextButton(
   369→                    onClick = { showVisibilityMenu = true }
   370→                ) {
   371→                    Icon(
   372→                        imageVector = when (uiState.visibility) {
   373→                            PostVisibility.PUBLIC -> Icons.Filled.Public
   374→                            PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   375→                            PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> Icons.Outlined.Group
   376→                            else -> Icons.Filled.Public
   377→                        },
   378→                        contentDescription = null
   379→                    )
   380→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   381→                    Text(
   382→                        when (uiState.visibility) {
   383→                            PostVisibility.PUBLIC -> stringResource(R.string.visibility_public)
   384→                            PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> stringResource(R.string.visibility_unlisted)
   385→                            PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> stringResource(R.string.visibility_followers)
   386→                            else -> stringResource(R.string.visibility_public)
   387→                        }
   388→                    )
   389→
   390→                    DropdownMenu(
   391→                        expanded = showVisibilityMenu,
   392→                        onDismissRequest = { showVisibilityMenu = false }
   393→                    ) {
   394→                        DropdownMenuItem(
   395→                            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.visibility_public)) },
   396→                            onClick = {
   397→                                viewModel.updateVisibility(PostVisibility.PUBLIC)
   398→                                showVisibilityMenu = false
   399→                            },
   400→                            leadingIcon = {
   401→                                Icon(Icons.Filled.Public, contentDescription = null)
   402→                            }
   403→                        )
   404→                        DropdownMenuItem(
   405→                            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.visibility_unlisted)) },
   406→                            onClick = {
   407→                                viewModel.updateVisibility(PostVisibility.UNLISTED)
   408→                                showVisibilityMenu = false
   409→                            },
   410→                            leadingIcon = {
   411→                                Icon(Icons.Outlined.Lock, contentDescription = null)
   412→                            }
   413→                        )
   414→                        DropdownMenuItem(
   415→                            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.visibility_followers)) },
   416→                            onClick = {
   417→                                viewModel.updateVisibility(PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS)
   418→                                showVisibilityMenu = false
   419→                            },
   420→                            leadingIcon = {
   421→                                Icon(Icons.Outlined.Group, contentDescription = null)
   422→                            }
   423→                        )
   424→                    }
   425→                }
   426→            }
   427→        }
   428→    }
   429→}

   431→@Composable
   432→private fun QuoteIndicator(
   433→    isLoading: Boolean,
   434→    post: Post? = null,
   435→    failed: Boolean = false
   436→) {
   437→    Surface(
   438→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   439→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(10.dp),
   440→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
   441→    ) {
   442→        Column(
   443→            modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
   444→        ) {
   445→            Row(
   446→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   447→            ) {
   448→                Icon(
   449→                    imageVector = Icons.Outlined.FormatQuote,
   450→                    contentDescription = null,
   451→                    modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   452→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   453→                )
   454→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(6.dp))
   455→                Text(
   456→                    text = stringResource(R.string.quoting),
   457→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   458→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   459→                )
   460→            }
   461→
   462→            if (isLoading) {
   463→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   464→                CircularProgressIndicator(
   465→                    modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp),
   466→                    strokeWidth = 2.dp
   467→                )
   468→            } else if (failed) {
   469→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   470→                Text(
   471→                    text = stringResource(R.string.quote_load_failed),
   472→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   473→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   474→                )
   475→            } else if (post != null) {
   476→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   477→                Row(
   478→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   479→                ) {
   480→                    AsyncImage(
   481→                        model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   482→                        contentDescription = null,
   483→                        modifier = Modifier
   484→                            .size(28.dp)
   485→                            .clip(CircleShape),
   486→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   487→                    )
   488→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   489→                    Column {
   490→                        Text(
   491→                            text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   492→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   493→                            maxLines = 1,
   494→                            overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   495→                        )
   496→                        Text(
   497→                            text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   498→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   499→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   500→                            maxLines = 1,
   501→                            overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   502→                        )
   503→                    }
   504→                }
   505→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   506→                Text(
   507→                    text = post.excerpt,
   508→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   509→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   510→                    maxLines = 2,
   511→                    overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   512→                )
   513→            }
   514→        }
   515→    }
   516→}
   517→
   518→@Composable
   519→private fun ReplyTargetPreview(
   520→    post: Post,
   521→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
   522→) {
   523→    Surface(
   524→        modifier = modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   525→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(8.dp),
   526→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   527→    ) {
   528→        Row(
   529→            modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp),
   530→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.Top
   531→        ) {
   532→            AsyncImage(
   533→                model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   534→                contentDescription = null,
   535→                modifier = Modifier
   536→                    .size(32.dp)
   537→                    .clip(CircleShape),
   538→                contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   539→            )
   540→
   541→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   542→
   543→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   544→                Text(
   545→                    text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   546→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   547→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   548→                    maxLines = 1,
   549→                    overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   550→                )
   551→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   552→                HtmlContent(
   553→                    html = post.content,
   554→                    maxLines = 3,
   555→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   556→                )
   557→            }
   558→        }
   559→    }
   560→}
